久遠「それは最後の手段です。何処かに動かす方法が――」: Kuon: “That is a last resort. There must be a way to move it—”
久遠はしゃがみ込むと、床を調べながら独り言を繰り返す。: Qwon crouched down, murmuring to herself as she examined the floor.
久遠「――床に擦れた傷はない。端の棚は動かない――つまり内側の棚が奥へ沈む或いは: Kuon: “—No scuff marks on the floor. The end shelves are fixed—so the inner shelves must slide back or lift—if there are wheels, it could easily—”
一番下段の棚に収まっている本を抜き出し、久遠は色々と調べている。: Pulling out a book from the bottom shelf, Qwon began to investigate.
ふと貌を上げた俺の目の前に、あの写真が飾られていた。: My eyes drifted up and I found myself staring at that photograph again.
護堂は僅かに目を細め、写真を眺める。: Godou narrowed his eyes slightly as he looked at the photo.
護堂「二十年程前になるか――当時青島は独逸の租借地でな、日本は対独参戦を機にかの: Godou: “Must have been twenty years now—. Tsingtao was a German leased territory back then, and Japan occupied the city when we entered the war against them. That photo was taken then.”
護堂「もっとも最近は独逸と相互防衛協定を結ぶかもしれんと云う動きもあるから――何: Godou: “Though lately there’s talk of a mutual defense pact with Germany—quite the irony.”
護堂は写真を見ながら苦笑する。: Godou let out a bitter chuckle while looking at the photo.
声の方向――真下を向くと、久遠が俺と護堂のズボンの裾を掴んで見上げてきていた。: I looked down toward the source of the voice to find Qwon gripping the hems of our trousers and looking up at us.
護堂が写真を元の棚に戻す。: Godou returned the photo to the shelf.
写真が飾られていた棚の奥に奇妙な窪みがあった。: I noticed a strange indentation in the back of the shelf where the photo had been.
俺が何かを見つけたのを察したのだろう、久遠は目で問いかけてくる。: Sensing I’d found something, Qwon looked at me questioningly.
確かに、窪みのある棚は久遠の頭より上に位置している。: True enough, the shelf with the indentation was well above Qwon’s head.
奏介「……逢禅寺もでかかったからな」: Sousuke: “...Ouzenji was a big guy, after all.”
久遠「体格が大きい者が優れていると云うのは、それ以外に取り柄のない人間が喧伝した: Kuon: “The notion that size equals superiority is a delusion spread by those with no other redeeming qualities.”
やれやれ、とひと息吐いて久遠の小柄な身体を抱え上げた。: With a sigh, I hoisted Qwon’s small frame up.
久遠「レバーですね。動かしてください」: Kuon: “It is a lever. Please move it.”
間髪入れず久遠は言う。: Qwon spoke without missing a beat.
奏介「待てよ。罠があるかも――」: Sousuke: “Wait. There might be a trap—”
久遠「隠し扉だけで充分な罠です。開閉装置に罠を仕掛ける意味はありません」: Kuon: “The hidden door itself is trap enough. There is no point in booby-trapping the opening mechanism.”
窪みに指をかける。: I hooked my fingers into the indentation.
ほんの僅かだけ浮き上がり、奥へ沈んでいく。: It lifted just a fraction of an inch and began to sink back into the wall.
床に視線を落としていた久遠が呟く。: Qwon murmured, her eyes fixed on the floor.
いくつかの筋が床に残っている。: Several faint tracks were visible on the surface.
美華夏「本当に隠し部屋があるなんて……」: Mikana: “To think there really was a hidden room...”
完全に開ききった本棚の隠し扉を前に、久遠が宣言した。: Before the now fully opened hidden door, Qwon made her declaration.
――そこは、書庫と云っても差し支えない空間だった。: —The space beyond was nothing short of a private library.
薄暗い室内に本棚が並び、書類綴じがいくつも積み重なっている。: Bookshelves lined the dimly lit room, with numerous document files stacked high.
奏介「こいつは……調べるのが面倒臭そうだな」: Sousuke: “This looks like... it’s going to be a pain to search.”
既に夜も更け、随分と時間が経っている。: It was already late, and a significant amount of time had passed.
ここにある物を全て調べようとするならば何日かかることだろうか。: If we tried to check everything here, it would take days.
久遠「古い書類は必要ありません。新しい、上の方にあるファイルから調べていきましょ: Kuon: “We do not need the old documents. Let us start with the newest files at the top.”
云うが早いか、久遠は近くにあった書類綴じを捲りだした。: No sooner had she said it than Qwon began leafing through a nearby folder.
部屋の中央にある机の側にあった椅子に腰掛け、書類を漁り始める。: I took a seat in a chair by the desk in the center of the room and began digging through documents.
隣で同じように書類に目を通していた美華夏が呟いた。: Mikage, who had been scanning documents next to me, murmured.
美華夏「内閣総理大臣、外務大臣、貴族院議長に陸軍参謀総長の名前まであるわ……恐ら: Mikana: “The names of the Prime Minister, the Foreign Minister, the Chairman of the House of Peers, and even the Chief of the Army General Staff... presumably the numbers following them are the amounts of bribes paid...”
護堂「随分と派手に金を撒いていたようだからな。米国や露西亜にも手を伸ばしていたら: Godou: “He was certainly spreading money around quite liberally. Apparently, he even had reach into America and Russia.”
久遠「――関東軍からの書簡がありました。柳条湖にて破壊工作を完遂せり――なるほど: Kuon: “—I found a letter from the Kwantung Army. 'Demolition work completed at Liutiaohu'—I see.”
護堂「……満州事変の発端となった事件だな」: Godou: “...The incident that sparked the Manchurian Incident.”
久遠「ですが今は関係ありません」: Kuon: “But it is of no concern to us right now.”
久遠は書類綴じを閉じると、別の書類を探し出す。: Qwon closed the folder and pulled out another.
美華夏「これって……公開したらとんでもない事にならないかしら？」: Mikana: “If we made this public... wouldn't it cause a national scandal?”
書類から視線を上げることなく久遠は断言した。: Qwon declared without even looking up from her papers.
美華夏「どうして？ だってこんな……政府上層部まで巻き込んでいる汚職事件なのよ？: Mikana: “Why? I mean, this is... a corruption scandal involving the very top of the government, isn't it?”
護堂「公開しようとした処で、間違いなく政府によって握りつぶされるだろう。それだけ: Godou: “If you tried to go public, the government would Undoubtedly bury it. And that’s the best-case scenario. At worst, you’d be arrested for endangering public order.”
久遠「最悪ではなくとも捕まるでしょうね。ここにある資料は今の国にとって――危険す: Kuon: “Even if it were not the worst case, you would certainly be detained. The materials here are—far too dangerous for the nation as it currently stands.”
書類を捲る久遠の手が止まった。: Qwon’s hand stopped as she turned a page.
久遠の手元を覗き込んでみるも、妙な図や数字が羅列しているだけで訳が解らない。: I peered at the paper in Qwon’s hand, but it was just a series of strange diagrams and columns of numbers that made no sense to me.
久遠「《リフ＝ラフ》の研究資料です。ただ――随分と初期の物ですね」: Kuon: “The research data for 'Riff-Raff'. Though—it is quite early material.”
久遠は溜息混じりに書類の山を見上げた。: Qwon looked up at the stack of documents with a sigh.
久遠「ここには《リフ＝ラフ》本体もないようですし――護堂」: Kuon: “The 'Riff-Raff' unit itself does not seem to be here either—Godou.”
久遠は貌を向けることすらせずに護堂を呼ぶ。: Qwon called out without even turning her head.
久遠「どうせ公開できない資料です。他にも契約書や権利書などもあるようですし、灰燼: Kuon: “It is data that can never be made public anyway. There seem to be contracts and titles here as well; it is far more efficient to reduce it all to ashes.”
奏介「……随分と乱暴な方法だな」: Sousuke: “...That’s a pretty brutal way to handle it.”
書類を部屋の片隅に積み上げていく護堂を眺めながら言う。: I spoke while watching Godou pile the documents in a corner of the room.
久遠「時間がありませんから。それに全てを燃やした方が、私が探している《リフ＝ラフ: Kuon: “We do not have time. Besides, by burning everything, we can also erase the 'Riff-Raff' data I am seeking.”
奏介「消すって……いいのか？」: Sousuke: “Erase it... is that really okay?”
久遠「構いません。設計の全ては私の頭の中に残っていますから。情報を整理する為に紙: Kuon: “It does not matter. The entire design remains in my head. Leaving it on paper for the sake of organizing my thoughts was a tactical error.”
そこで少しだけ、久遠は悔恨の表情を見せた。: For just a moment, a look of regret crossed Qwon’s face.
久遠「《リフ＝ラフ》の本体は逢禅寺本人が持っているでしょう。厄介ではありますが、: Kuon: “The 'Riff-Raff' unit itself should be held by Ouzenji. It will be a nuisance, but nothing to be feared.”
奏介「恐るるに足りない、って……俺はそいつで何度も危険な目に遭ってるんだぞ？」: Sousuke: “'Nothing to be feared'...? I’ve nearly been killed because of that thing multiple times, you know!”
久遠「《リフ＝ラフ》は人の心を惑わす装置です。その効果は対象が心神喪失状態にある: Kuon: “'Riff-Raff' is a device that deludes the human mind. Its effect is strongest when the subject is in a state of mental exhaustion; you appear to be in peak physical and mental condition right now, Sousuke.”
久遠「さらに奏介の場合、他の人とは決定的な違いがあり――」: Kuon: “Furthermore, in your case, Sousuke, there is a decisive difference compared to others—”
美華夏の絹を引き裂くような悲鳴が上がった。: Mikage’s blood-curdling scream echoed through the room.
書類の山に何やら細工をしていた護堂が立ち上がり、サッと部屋の外――逢禅寺の社長室: Godou, who had been doing something to the pile of documents, stood up and sprinted out of the room toward Ouzenji’s office.
俺も後を追い、部屋の外へ転がり出た。: I followed right on his heels and scrambled out of the room.
――最初にすぐ、これは夢だと気が付いた。: —I realized almost immediately that this was a dream.
理由などない。ただ漠然と現実離れした空間の歪みを感じていただけだ。: There was no logical reason. I just felt a vague distortion in the space that was entirely detached from reality.
だから俺は布団から起きあがり、朧気に揺れる部屋を見回して、彼女が現れるのをただじ: So I sat up from my futon and looked around the hazily shimmering room, simply waiting for her to appear.
隣に寝ている筈の久遠の姿も見えなかった。: Qwon, who should have been sleeping next to me, was nowhere to be seen.
今の俺の夢の中では、彼女には少々居心地が悪いだろうから。: Given the nature of my dream right now, she probably would have felt a bit out of place.
ゆっくりと空気が揺らめき、目の前に綾音の肢体が浮かび上がった。: The air slowly began to ripple, and Ayane’s form drifted into view before my eyes.
ふわり、と綾音の身体が宙に浮く。: Ayane’s body floated weightlessly in the air.
奏介「俺が……お前を殺したんだな」: Sousuke: “I... I was the one who killed you, wasn't I?”
綾音「……奏介は悪くないよ。奏介はただ……操られただけ」: Ayane: “...It wasn't your fault, Sousuke. You were just... you were being manipulated.”
温もりも柔らかな感触もない、幻の接吻。: A phantom touch with no warmth or softness.
その呪詛に俺は何も言えなくなる。: Faced with that curse, I found myself unable to speak.
綾音「謝られても……わたしは還れないから」: Ayane: “Even if you apologize... I can never come back.”
綾音「……わたしを抱いた事、後悔してる？」: Ayane: “...Do you regret... holding me that night?”
あの時綾音を抱いていなければ、俺は綾音を殺していないだろう。: If I hadn't held Ayane that night, I wouldn't have killed her.
だがその場合、これほどまでに彼女を愛おしく思っていない訳で――: But in that case, I wouldn't have come to cherish her this much—
綾音「もし後悔している、だなんて言ったら――呪っちゃうんだから」: Ayane: “If you say you regret it—I’ll curse you forever.”
くすくすと、声なき声で笑う綾音。: Ayane laughed with a voiceless chuckle.
笑うのを止め、綾音が向き直る。: Stopping her laughter, Ayane looked at me again.
綾音「奏介に殺されたんじゃ、仕方ないかなって思ってる」: Ayane: “I think... if I was going to be killed by anyone, I’m glad it was you.”
綾音「だって、好きな人の側で息を引き取れるんだよ。こんな幸せな事ってないと思わな: Ayane: “Because I got to take my last breath by the side of the person I love. Can you think of anything more happy than that?”
綾音「わたしが最期に感じたのは、温かい奏介の体温だった」: Ayane: “The last thing I felt was your warm body heat, Sousuke.”
綾音「これは――幸せな事なんだよね？」: Ayane: “That’s... that’s a happy thing, isn't it?”
そんなの――俺に答える事は出来ない。: I couldn't—couldn't possibly answer a question like that.
幻の肢体が血に染まっていく。: Her phantom form began to stain with blood.
綾音「奏介の……あ、あれを……あそこに挿入れた時よりも……痛かったよ……」: Ayane: “Even more... than when you... when you put that... inside me... it hurt so much more...”
綾音「ヤダ、やめて、痛いよって、何度も言おうとしたのに……奏介はわたしの口も塞い: Ayane: “I tried to say no, to stop, that it hurt, so many times... but you just covered my mouth... and I couldn't breathe... and you were just so... so warm...”
綾音「痛い……痛いよ、奏介……止めて、ダメ……」: Ayane: “It hurts... it hurts, Sousuke... stop, please don't...”
布団をはね除け飛び起きる。: I kicked off the covers and bolted upright.
酷く汗をかいている。: I was drenched in a cold, heavy sweat.
ナイフが刺さっていた綾音と同じ箇所。: In the exact same spot where the knife had pierced Ayane.
俺が刺した箇所。: The spot where I had stabbed her.
俺の腕を引き、久遠は静かに声をかけてくる。: Tugging at my arm, Qwon called out to me in a quiet voice.
起きあがった久遠が、俺の頭を撫でてくる。: Having sat up, Qwon reached out and stroked my hair.
久遠「大丈夫……私が側にいます」: Kuon: “It is alright... I am right here by your side.”
久遠「貴方は――何も畏れる必要はありません」: Kuon: “You—have no reason to fear anything.”
久遠が俺の頭を抱え込む。: Qwon pulled my head into her embrace.
久遠の鼓動。久遠の体温。久遠の匂い。: Qwon’s heartbeat. Qwon’s body heat. Qwon’s scent.
久遠の白い肌。久遠の柔らかな肢体。: Qwon’s pale skin. Qwon’s soft, supple limbs.
五感全てで久遠を感じつつ、俺は再度目を閉じた。: Feeling her with all five senses, I closed my eyes once more.
その言葉に、久遠は何の反応も示さなかった。: To those words, Qwon offered no response at all.
風は全く感じられないのだが、それでも雲の流れが判るのはひとえにただずっと空を眺め: I couldn't feel even a whisper of wind, yet the only reason I knew the clouds were moving was because I had been staring at the sky for so long.
他に、何もする気にはなれなかった。: I didn't have the will to do anything else.
何かをしていた方が気が紛れて良いのだろうが、それでも動く気にはなれない。: I knew it would be better to keep myself busy to distract my mind, but I couldn't bring myself to move.
――だからずっと、俺の頭の中では綾音の姿が浮かんでいる。: —And so, Ayane's image remained burned into the back of my mind.
幻の彼女はただじっと俺の事を見つめている。: Her phantom self just stared at me in silence.
恨み辛みを言わないのは、今が昼間だからだろうか。: Was the reason she wasn't hurling curses and resentment at me simply because it was daytime?
何処へ行ったのかも知らない。: I didn't even know where she had gone.
まあ――彼女の事だから心配は要らないだろう。: Well—knowing her, there was no need to worry.
――煙草を喫いたくなった。: —I felt a sudden craving for a smoke.
ポケットの中をまさぐるが、燐寸の箱しか出てこない。: I fumbled through my pockets, but all I found was a box of matches.
煙草を買いに行く程の気力すらない。: I didn't even have the energy to go out and buy cigarettes.
燐寸棒を咥え、また空を眺める。: I clamped a matchstick between my teeth and went back to staring at the sky.
雲はまたほんの少しだけその位置を変えていた。: The clouds had shifted their positions just a fraction more.
階段を上る足音が聞こえてきた。: I heard the sound of footsteps coming up the stairs.
何やら手に袋を提げている。: She was carrying a bag in her hand.
久遠「駅前の路上でタコ焼きが売られていました」: Kuon: “They were selling takoyaki on the street in front of the station.”
俺の隣に腰を下ろし、包みを開ける久遠。: Qwon sat down next to me and began to open the package.
更に今はそんな気分にもなれない。: In fact, I wasn't in the mood for anything at all.
久遠「もの凄く陰気な男性が売っていたのですが……そこを素通りして別の屋台で買って: Kuon: “A man with a dreadfully gloomy expression was selling them... but I bypassed him and bought these from another stall.”
久遠「……最初のおじさんは泣きそうな貌をしていましたけれど」: Kuon: “...The first man looked as if he were on the verge of tears, though.”
そう喋りながら久遠はタコ焼きを口へ運ぶ。: As she spoke, Qwon popped a takoyaki into her mouth.
まあ普通に焼いていれば旨い物なのだろう。: I suppose they're bound to be good if they're cooked halfway decently.
久遠「奏介もどうぞ」: Kuon: “You should have some as well, Sousuke.”
箸で摘んだタコ焼きを俺の口元へ押しつけてくる。: She pressed a takoyaki held between her chopsticks against my lips.
程良い熱さと小麦粉の香ばしい匂いが鼻腔をくすぐる。: A pleasant heat and the savory scent of toasted flour tickled my nose.
億劫に貌を逸らす。: I turned my face away, the effort of speaking feeling like a burden.
久遠「なるほど――奏介はいつものおじさんのタコ焼きじゃないと食べないのですね」: Kuon: “I see—so you will only eat takoyaki if it is from your usual old man.”
久遠の側を離れ、布団に寝転がる。: I moved away from Qwon and lay down on the futon.
久遠「まだお昼過ぎですよ」: Kuon: “It is only just past noon.”
実を言うと、眠気など全く無い。: To tell the truth, I wasn't sleepy at all.
眠ってしまえば煩わしさから解放されるが、綾音からは解放されない。: If I slept, I could escape the annoyance of the world, but I couldn't escape Ayane.
だから眠らずに呆としていたのだが――: That was why I stayed awake in a daze, and yet—
久遠「でしたら、子守唄などいかがですか」: Kuon: “In that case, would you care for a lullaby?”
少しだけ残念そうに久遠は項垂れ、タコ焼きを頬張る。: Looking a little disappointed, Qwon lowered her head and went back to eating her takoyaki.
俺が沈んでいるのを見て構おうとしているのだろうが――: I knew she was trying to look after me because I was depressed, but—
今は少し、放っておいて欲しかった。: Right now, I just wanted to be left alone.
――ただじっと天井を眺めていた。: —I just stared blankly at the ceiling.
微動だにせず、布団の上に寝転がり続ける。: I didn't move a muscle, staying sprawled out on the futon.
朝からずっとこの調子だった。: I’d been like this since morning.
動く気にはなれなかった。: I didn't have the heart to move.
俺は返事すらするのが億劫で、ただちらりと横目で久遠を見る。: Even answering felt like too much effort; I just glanced at Qwon out of the corner of my eye.
窓際で本を読んでいた久遠が貌を上げてこちらを見ていた。: Qwon, who had been reading by the window, looked up at me.
久遠に背中を向ける。: I turned my back to her.
食欲も何も感じなかった。それ以上に、飯の為に何かすると云う事が面倒で仕方なかった: I didn't feel the slightest bit of hunger. More than that, the very idea of doing something just to get food felt like an unbearable chore.
久遠「――何時までそうしているつもりですか」: Kuon: “—How long do you intend to stay like this?”
ややきつい調子で久遠が声を掛けてきた。: Qwon spoke in a sharp, demanding tone.
久遠「悩むのも結構ですが、それでは前に進む事は出来ませんよ」: Kuon: “Wallowing in your grief is all well and good, but you will never move forward that way.”
説教など聞きたくない。: I didn't want to hear a lecture.
何も言われる筋合いなどない。: She had no right to say anything to me.
久遠「貴方がそうしている間にも、《リフ＝ラフ》を利用した犯罪が続いています」: Kuon: “Even as you lie there, crimes utilizing 'Riff-Raff' are continuing.”
久遠「奏介や綾音さんのような被害者が今も増え続けているのです」: Kuon: “The number of victims like you and Ayane-san is increasing even now.”
奏介「……俺には関係ねえ」: Sousuke: “...It’s got nothing to do with me.”
今更俺がどうこうした処で――綾音と璃宝は還っては来ない。: No matter what I did at this late stage—Ayane and Riho weren't coming back.
久遠は話すのを止めようとはしない。: Qwon showed no intention of stopping.
久遠「私は――この流れを止めたいのです。私の撒いた種でこれ以上被害が出るのは耐え: Kuon: “I—I want to stop this cycle. I cannot bear to see any more suffering caused by the seeds I have sown.”
久遠が寝転がる俺の肩に手を掛けてきた。: Qwon placed her hand on my shoulder as I lay there.
振り払うことも出来ず、俺はただ黙っていた。: I couldn't even find the strength to brush it off; I just stayed silent.
久遠「自らの意志を奪われる事ほど、人間として苦しい事はありません」: Kuon: “There is no greater agony for a human being than to be robbed of their own will.”
