奏介「久し振り、じゃねえだろ……」: Sousuke: “'A while' is putting it lightly...”
地面で伸びているハチとクマを眺める。: I looked down at Hachi and Kuma, who were both out cold on the pavement.
奏介「取り敢えず――縄か何かねえか？ こいつらをふん縛って訊きたい事がある」: Sousuke: “For now—do we have any rope? I want to tie these two up and ask them a few questions.”
猿轡まで噛まされ、太い縄で雁字搦めにされたハチとクマを見下ろし、息を吐く。: I let out a sigh, looking down at Hachi and Kuma, who were now gagged and bound tightly with thick ropes.
……妙に凝った縛り方をしているのは気にしない事にする。: ...I decided to ignore the fact that the knots were unusually elaborate.
ハチの猿轡を外して問い掛ける。: I removed Hachi’s gag and questioned him.
奏介「――悪ぃが、身内が襲われて寛大でいられる程お人好しじゃねぇんでな」: Sousuke: “—Sorry, but I’m not a kind enough man to be generous when my people are attacked.”
ハチの顔面に蹴りを見舞い、俺は低く呟く。: I delivered a kick to Hachi’s face and muttered the words in a low voice.
ハチ「ンな事言われてもなっ……言えねーモンは言えねーんだよ！」: Hachi: “Even if you say that... I can't tell you what I don't know!”
璃宝「……アンタのやり方じゃダメよ」: Riho: “...Your way isn't going to work.”
更に一発喰らわせようとした処で璃宝が俺の前に出た。: As I was about to give him another hit, Riho stepped in front of me.
何処から持ち出してきたのか、璃宝は乗馬鞭を片手にうっすらと笑みを浮かべながら縛ら: From somewhere, Riho had produced a riding crop; she approached the bound Hachi with a faint, predatory smile.
そう言いながらもハチの腰は引けている。: Even as he said it, Hachi was shrinking back in fear.
璃宝「ウフフ……いいわよ、すぐに口を割っちゃあ詰まらないもの」: Riho: “Ufufu... that's fine. It's no fun if you spill everything right away.”
鞭の先端でハチの頬を撫でる璃宝。: Riho traced Hachi’s cheek with the tip of her crop.
俺にその気はないが、ある奴からすれば堪らないのだろうか。: I wasn't into that kind of thing, but I wondered if some people found it irresistible.
これまでそういう行為をされていないのが何とも有難い。: I felt a surge of gratitude that I’d never been on the receiving end of that look before.
ハチ「ひい――っ！？ わっ、わかった、はっ、話せばいいんだろっ！？」: Hachi: “Hii—?! Okay, okay, I get it! I'll talk, alright?!”
璃宝に迫られ、ハチはあっさりと陥落したようだ。: Faced with Riho’s advance, Hachi crumbled instantly.
ハチ「ぼっ、僕たちは……そこの玖藤の裏切りを裁くため、見せしめにそいつの身近にい: Hachi: “W-We were... we were ordered to make an example out of the people close to Kudou to punish him for his betrayal—”
璃宝が鞭で床を叩く。: Riho cracked the crop against the floor.
ハチ「ひっ！？ い、言いますっ！！ あ、姐さんに決まってるじゃねえーか！ あんた: Hachi: “Hih?! I-I'll tell you!! Of course it was the Boss Lady! She was in a terrifying rage because you made a complete fool out of her!!”
あの洋館での捨て台詞――裏切りの代償は高く付く――と言ったのはこう云う意味か。: So that’s what she meant by her parting words at the mansion—that the price of betrayal would be steep.
転がされたままのクマが口を開く。用意周到と云うか――いつの間にかまた新しい色眼鏡: Still lying on the ground, Kuma spoke up. He was either incredibly well-prepared or just obsessive; he had somehow already put on yet another new pair of tinted glasses.
猿轡は自力で外したのか、床に布きれが落ちていた。: He must have removed his gag himself, as the scrap of cloth lay on the floor next to him.
クマ「男とは鞭の痛みを快感に変えるものだ」: Kuma: “A real man transforms the pain of the whip into pleasure.”
ハチ「うるせえっ！！ 僕は姐さんの責め以外受け付けねえ体質なんだよっ！！」: Hachi: “Shut up!! I'm only wired to accept punishment from the Boss Lady!!”
クマ「姐御の罵倒よりも、御巫久遠嬢の冷徹な言葉責めの方が快感ではあるが――」: Kuma: “While the Boss Lady’s insults are one thing, the cold, intellectual verbal abuse of Qwon Mikanagi is far more exquisite—”
よく知った名前が出てきて、俺は堪らずクマの胸ぐらを掴み上げた。: Hearing a name I knew all too well, I couldn't help but haul Kuma up by his collar.
奏介「……何故其処で久遠の名前が出てくる――？」: Sousuke: “...Why the hell is Qwon’s name coming out of your mouth—?”
クマ「く……人の趣味をとやかく言われる筋合いはない」: Kuma: “Kuh... you have no right to judge a man's personal tastes.”
ハチ「――そいつはあの女に惚れてるのさ」: Hachi: “—He's got a crush on the girl.”
クマ「ハチ！？ 惚れているとは何だ！！ 純粋に可憐な乙女に懸想していて何が悪い！: Kuma: “Hachi?! What do you mean 'crush'!! What's wrong with a pure, honest yearning for a lovely young maiden?!”
クマの鳩尾に膝をめり込ませ黙らせる。: I drove my knee into Kuma’s solar plexus to silence him.
ハチ「――御巫久遠は組織の計画成就の為に攫われてきた。僕は下っ端だからよく解らね: Hachi: “—Qwon Mikanagi was abducted to help the organization fulfill its plans. I'm just a low-level grunt, so I don't know the details, but they were forcing her to do all sorts of things behind the scenes.”
大人しくなったハチが話し始める。: Having quieted down, Hachi began to explain.
ハチ「けどな、御巫久遠が何やら組織にとって善からぬ事を企んでいたらしくてな、粛正: Hachi: “But then, word got around that Qwon Mikanagi was plotting something against the organization. They tried to purge her, but she managed to escape.”
突然叫び声を上げたクマに再度当て身を喰らわす。: Kuma suddenly screamed, and I hit him again to knock him out.
俺が隠れていた古書店にやってきたのは、その時からだろう。: That must have been when she showed up at the old bookstore where I was hiding.
奏介「俺の身近の人間を、と言ったな？」: Sousuke: “You said 'the people close to me', didn't you?”
ハチ「――ああ。僕等はそう命令された。……他の処にも仲間が向かってるだろうさ」: Hachi: “—Yeah. Those were our orders. ...The others are probably on their way to the other locations too.”
昨日からずっと隠れ家を空けている。: I’d been away from the hideout since yesterday.
奏介「――璃宝、此奴等を見張っていてくれ」: Sousuke: “—Riho, keep an eye on these two.”
璃宝「警察には届けなくてもいいのかい？」: Riho: “You aren't turning them over to the police?”
奏介「警察は信用ならねぇ。連中も此奴等とグルだ」: Sousuke: “I can't trust the police. They're in league with these bastards.”
騒がれないよう、再度ふたりの口に猿轡を噛ませる。: To make sure they didn't raise an alarm, I gagged them both again.
鞭を片手に璃宝が微笑んだ。: Riho smiled, crop still in hand.
バーを出てすぐ、後ろから追ってきた千花が声を掛けてきた。: As I left the bar, Chika chased after me and called out.
何やら切羽詰まった様子に足を止める。: I stopped, noticing her desperate expression.
千花「はっ、はいっ……わたし……あの夜に……その……見てしまったんです……」: Chika: “Y-Yes... I... on that night... um... I saw it...”
千花「……玖藤さんが最初に事件に巻き込まれた夜……です。玖藤さんがお店を出て行っ: Chika: “...The night Kudou-san first got caught up in the incident. Right after Kudou-san left the shop, the Master went somewhere too.”
千花「はい。……わたしはマスターに用事があったので、傘を差して後を追いました。…: Chika: “Yes. ...I had some business with the Master, so I grabbed an umbrella and followed him. ...And then...”
千花は目を伏せて頭を振る。: Chika lowered her eyes and shook her head.
千花「マスターが……お、女の人をナイフで……」: Chika: “The Master... he stabbed a woman with a knife...”
千花「……芸者さんのようでした。血塗れで……倒れて……」: Chika: “...She looked like a geisha. She was... covered in blood... and she fell...”
マスターが殺したのか――？: The Master was the one who killed her—?
俺が余程険しい貌をしていたのだろう、千花は脅えた様子で謝ってくる。: I must have been wearing an incredibly grim expression, as Chika began to apologize in terror.
千花「でっ……でもっ、わたしがちゃんとすぐに話していれば……こんな事にはならなか: Chika: “B-But, if only I'd spoken up right away... I thought maybe none of this would have happened...”
千花「でっ――でもっ！！ わたしが見たのだって見間違いかもしれませんし――実際そ: Chika: “B-But!! Maybe what I saw was just a mistake—I actually think it was... but...”
千花「先程言っていた久遠さんと云うのは……よくバーに来ていた方でしょうか？」: Chika: “That person you mentioned, Qwon-san... was she a frequent customer at the bar?”
奏介「……営業時間に見た覚えはねぇがな。確かに此処へはよく出入りしていたようだ」: Sousuke: “...I don't recall seeing her during business hours. But she certainly seemed to come and go from here quite often.”
千花「……ええ。その子――久遠さんは、マスターの親戚だと言ってました」: Chika: “...Yes. That girl—Qwon-san—she told me she was a relative of the Master.”
だが、これでマスターと久遠の線が繋がった。: But now, the connection between the Master and Qwon was clear.
更にマスターは俺が巻き込まれた芸妓殺人にも関わっているかもしれない。: Furthermore, the Master might have been involved in the geiko murder I was framed for.
奏介「マスターも……奴らの仲間か？」: Sousuke: “Is the Master... one of them too?”
千花「それは……わかりません。ですけど、あの人たちはマスターの事を一言も話してい: Chika: “I... I don't know. But those men didn't say a single word about the Master. So he's either unrelated, or they don't know about him—”
気に留めておいた方がよさそうだ。: It was something I needed to keep in mind.
奏介「千花、お前も店の中であの莫迦ふたりを見張っていろ。もしまた他に誰か来たらや: Sousuke: “Chika, you stay in the shop and keep an eye on those two idiots. If anyone else shows up, run before things get dangerous, okay?”
千花は店に戻ろうと数歩進んでからこちらを振り向いた。: Chika took a few steps toward the shop before turning back.
時間を節約する為に、飯田橋から日暮里まで鉄道を使い、そこから谷中墓地を突っ切って: To save time, I took the train from Iidabashi to Nippori, then sprinted through the Yanaka Cemetery to Dangozaka.
辺りの様子に不審な点は見あたらない。古書店の扉も閉じられたままだ。: There were no signs of anything unusual in the area. The door to the bookstore was still closed.
見上げると、二階の窓から久遠が貌を覗かせていた。: I looked up to see Qwon peering out from the second-floor window.
安堵の息を吐く。: I let out a breath of relief.
とはいえ、うかうかしていられない。: However, I couldn't afford to be complacent.
俺はすぐさま建物の中へ入り、階段を駆け上った。: I immediately entered the building and sprinted up the stairs.
いつもと同じように、久遠は本を読みながら俺を出迎えた。: As usual, Qwon greeted me while reading a book.
頤に指を当てて考え込む久遠。: Qwon rested her finger against her chin, thinking.
久遠「――昨晩、仔猫が入り込んできました」: Kuon: “—Last night, a kitten wandered in.”
奏介「まあ……無事でなによりだ」: Sousuke: “Well... I'm just glad you're safe.”
久遠は単刀直入に訊ねてきた。いや、訊ねてきたと云うよりも、確認の為に聞いたと云っ: Qwon asked bluntly. No, it wasn't so much a question as it was a confirmation of something she already suspected.
俺は簡潔にバーで起こった事を久遠に話して聞かせた。マスター云々の処は話さなかった: I gave Qwon a brief summary of what had happened at the bar. I didn't mention the part about the Master.
久遠「成程、それで急いで戻って来たのですね。此処は問題ありません。私が潜伏場所に: Kuon: “I see. So that is why you rushed back. This place is not an issue. I was the one who chose it as a hideout. They have no way of knowing about it.”
久遠「それよりも奏介、まず此処へ来たのは失敗です」: Kuon: “More importantly, Sousuke, coming here first was a mistake.”
久遠は軽く溜息を吐きつつ言葉を続ける。: Qwon continued, letting out a small sigh.
久遠「貴方の身近な人間を狙うのであれば、私よりもずっと適した人物が居ます」: Kuon: “If their aim was to target the people close to you, there is someone far more suitable than me.”
奏介「――ッ！？ 柚芭の事か……？ だが俺は今朝まであいつと一緒に居たから――」: Sousuke: “—?! You mean Yuzuha...? But I was with her until this morning, so—”
……大丈夫だと、無意識のうちに信じていた。: ...Unconsciously, I had believed she was safe.
俺よりも先に久遠が決断し、本を置いて立ち上がった。: Qwon made the decision before I even could, setting her book aside and standing up.
久遠「今は一刻の猶予もなりません。円タクを使ってでも急ぐべきです」: Kuon: “There is not a moment to lose. We should use a taxi if necessary.”
俺は久遠の手を引き、古書店の外へ出た。: I took Qwon’s hand and we left the bookstore.
坂の上――駒込肴町の方へ行けばタクシーくらい拾えるに違いないと信じながら。: Believing that if we headed toward the top of the hill—toward Komagome Sakanamachi—we’d surely be able to flag down a taxi.
――俺は、無人の室内で口唇を噛み締めていた。: —I stood in the empty room, biting my lip.
入口の扉は鍵が掛かっていなかった。: The front door had been unlocked.
畳には複数の靴跡が残されていた。: There were multiple sets of footprints on the tatami.
久遠が他のよりも一回り小さな靴跡を見つけた。: Qwon found a set of footprints that was a size smaller than the others.
自分でも驚くほど、低く、冷徹な声だった。: My own voice was cold and sharp, surprising even me.
奏介「――奴らは何処へ行ったと思う」: Sousuke: “—Where do you think they went?”
久遠「此処からほど近く、確実に身を隠せる場所――軍関連施設は人目がありすぎますし: Kuon: “Somewhere nearby where they can be certain of remaining hidden—military facilities are too public, and other locations would make communication difficult—”
久遠「――奏介、飯田橋まで戻りましょう」: Kuon: “—Sousuke, let us return to Iidabashi.”
久遠「戸山ヶ原の近衛騎兵連隊から神楽坂、飯田橋を抜けて北の丸の近衛師団まで、道路: Kuon: “There are underground passages running along the roads from the Guard Cavalry Regiment at Toyamagahara, through Kagurazaka and Iidabashi, all the way to the Guard Division at Kitanomaru.”
久遠「軍事機密ですからご存じないでしょうね」: Kuon: “It is a military secret, so I imagine you were unaware.”
久遠は国家機密を何でもない事のように俺に話す。: Qwon spoke of national secrets as if they were common knowledge.
久遠「その地下道の途中――九段下の軍人会館のそばに、逢禅寺清正――《清鳳会》の首: Kuon: “Along that underground route—near the Army Hall in Kudanshita—stands a building constructed by Kiyomasa Ouzenji, the leader of the Seifuu-kai.”
軍との関わりを匂わせていた《清鳳会》。だとすればそんな処に本拠地を構えていたとし: The Seifuu-kai had hinted at military ties. If that was the case, it made sense for them to have a hideout in such a place.
久遠「無論彼は実業家と云う表の貌も持ち合わせています。むしろ逢禅寺清正が表だって: Kuon: “Naturally, he also maintains the public face of a businessman. In fact, it is extremely rare for Kiyomasa Ouzenji to be seen publicly involved in Seifuu-kai activities.”
久遠「いつもは――相馬葵が《清鳳会》を取り仕切っています。彼女も《逢禅寺商会》で: Kuon: “Normally—Aoi Souma handles the operations of the Seifuu-kai. Although she also holds the title of presidential secretary at Ouzenji Trading.”
今はそんな御託を聴いている余裕はない。: I didn't have the luxury of listening to her lecture right now.
久遠「……断言は出来ません。ですが確率はかなり高いかと思います」: Kuon: “...I cannot say for certain. However, I believe the probability is quite high.”
奏介「お前が高確率と言うんなら其処で当たりだろうさ。……行くぞ」: Sousuke: “If you say it’s likely, then that’s where she’ll be. ...Let’s move.”
俺たちはアパートを飛び出し、地下道路の入口があると云う飯田橋の駅へ向かう事にした: We burst out of the apartment and headed toward Iidabashi Station, where the entrance to the underground road was said to be located.
俺は久遠に導かれるまま、飯田橋駅の片隅から梯子を降りて暗い地下通路へ足を踏み入れ: Guided by Qwon, I descended a ladder from a corner of Iidabashi Station and stepped into the dark underground passage.
朧気ながら窺える地下通路は、自動車も走れそうな程広い空間だった。: The tunnel, visible only in glimpses, was vast—wide enough for a car to drive through.
床もコンクリで均されているのか、カツカツと靴音も響く。: The floor was leveled with concrete, and our footsteps rang out with a sharp *clack*.
南の方へ歩いている筈なのだが、地下道なので全く解らない。: We should have been walking south, but in the underground dark, it was impossible to tell.
奏介「やれやれ――結構遠いな」: Sousuke: “Good grief—this is quite a distance.”
久遠「仕方ありません。およそ五百メートルはありますから」: Kuon: “It cannot be helped. It is approximately five hundred meters.”
奏介「これだけの穴をいつの間にか掘っていたとはな……」: Sousuke: “To think they dug a hole like this without anyone noticing...”
久遠「この街の地下には様々な目的で掘られた地下通路が縦横無尽に走っています。ほと: Kuon: “The underground of this city is crisscrossed with tunnels dug for various purposes. Most are for military use—clandestine routes created as emergency communication passages.”
奏介「それで近衛連隊と繋がっているのか……」: Sousuke: “So that’s how it connects to the Guard Regiment...”
久遠「彼らはこの通路の支道の一部を塞ぎ、地下室として使っています。私たちは其処か: Kuon: “They have sealed off a portion of one of the branch roads to use as a basement. We shall use that to infiltrate the building's interior.”
久遠「もしかしたら――その地下室こそ奏介の妹さんが囚われている場所かもしれません: Kuon: “It is possible—that basement is exactly where your sister is being held, Sousuke.”
一刻も早く柚芭を助け出したい。: I wanted to rescue Yuzuha as quickly as possible.
巻き込んでしまった事を詫びたかった。: I wanted to apologize for getting her caught up in this.
暗がりの中、久遠が指差した先には板張りの壁が聳え立っていた。: In the gloom, Qwon pointed toward a boarded-up wall.
板の隙間から光が漏れ出てきている。扉が付いているようだ。: Light was leaking from the gaps between the boards. It looked like there was a door.
低く小声で呟き、俺は静かに扉を押し開けた。: I whispered in a low voice and quietly pushed the door open.
明らかにトンネルの一部と判る湾曲した天井。: The curved ceiling clearly identified it as part of the tunnel.
何が詰められていたのか、木箱が乱雑に積み上げられ、建材のような木片が転がっている: Wooden crates were stacked haphazardly, and scraps of building material lay scattered about.
久遠はそう囁くと、身を屈めて物陰に隠れながら前へ進んでいく。: Qwon whispered, then crouched low and moved forward, sticking to the shadows of the crates.
こう云う時小柄な彼女が居て助かった。俺ではそう身軽に動く事も出来ない。: I was glad she was so small; I wouldn't have been able to move nearly as nimbly.
扉近くの木箱の陰で息を潜め、待つ。倉庫全体は見渡せないが、人が動く気配はあまり感: I held my breath and waited in the shadow of a crate near the door. I couldn't see the entire warehouse, but there was no sign of anyone moving.
何処からか久遠が俺の名を呼ぶ声がした。: I heard Qwon calling my name from somewhere.
俺は矢も楯もたまらずに飛び出していた。: I couldn't hold myself back and sprinted forward.
倉庫の中でも少し開けた処――そこに、縛られた柚芭が横たわっていた。: In a slightly open area of the warehouse—there lay a bound Yuzuha.
久遠「……気を失っているだけです。それよりも奏介、お静かに。まだ此処の外の様子が: Kuon: “...She has merely lost consciousness. More importantly, Sousuke, keep your voice down. We do not yet know the situation outside this room.”
頷きながら、柚芭を縛っている縄を外そうと試みる。ナイフがないので縄を断ち切る事も: Nodding, I began trying to untie the ropes binding Yuzuha. Without a knife, I couldn't simply cut through them.
事態が飲み込めていない様子の柚芭を抱きかかえる。: I pulled Yuzuha into my arms as she struggled to grasp the situation.
柚芭「んっ……ダメだよお兄ちゃん、こんな処で……」: Yuzuha: “*Nn*... no, Onii-chan, not in a place like this...”
軽く頬を叩いて柚芭を起こす。: I lightly slapped her cheek to bring her back to her senses.
柚芭「ぅ……ん？ や、な、なにこれ……縛られて……えっ？」: Yuzuha: “*Ugh*... hm? Wait, what is this... tied up... eh?”
漸く事態を理解したのか、柚芭が身悶えする。: Finally realizing what was happening, Yuzuha writhed in distress.
柚芭「まっ、まさか……お兄ちゃん……こんな性癖が……？」: Yuzuha: “N-No way... Onii-chan... do you actually have... this kind of kink...?”
何とか縄を外し、柚芭を解放する。: I managed to loosen the ropes and free Yuzuha.
しきりに腕をさすりながら柚芭がぼやく。: Yuzuha grumbled, rubbing her arms repeatedly.
奏介「他に何もされてないな？」: Sousuke: “They didn't do anything else to you, did they?”
柚芭「うん、たぶん……身体のあちこちは痛いけど……」: Yuzuha: “Yeah, I think... everything hurts, though...”
柚芭「えっと……お兄ちゃんが出掛けてから、着替えて朝ご飯作ってたら、誰かが来て…: Yuzuha: “Well... after you left, Onii-chan, I was changing and starting to make breakfast, and then someone came... and I was suddenly hit...”
じわり、と柚芭の目に涙が浮かぶ。: Tears began to well in Yuzuha’s eyes.
抱きついてくる柚芭を慰める。: I comforted Yuzuha as she clung to me.
久遠「――安心するのはまだ早いです」: Kuon: “—It is too early to be relieved.”
久遠「時間を喰いすぎました。誰かが――来ます」: Kuon: “We have spent too much time. Someone—is coming.”
辺りを見回す。俺たちが入ってきた扉の他に、入口らしき物は見あたらない。: I looked around. Aside from the door we’d entered through, there was no other obvious entrance.
柚芭を見つけた以上、もう此処へ留まる理由はない。: Now that I’d found Yuzuha, there was no reason to stay.
久遠「――遅かったようですね」: Kuon: “—It seems we are too late.”
久遠が倉庫の一点を見つめて言った。: Qwon said, staring at a single point in the warehouse.
葵「――また鼠が迷い込んでいるようね」: Aoi: “—It seems more mice have lost their way.”
地下室の片隅から現れた見慣れた女に俺は舌打ちをした。: I clicked my tongue as the familiar woman appeared from a corner of the basement.
葵「裏切り者がふたりも首を揃えてくれるなんて――餌を撒いておいた甲斐があったと云: Aoi: “To have two traitors offer up their heads at once—scattering the bait was well worth the effort, it seems.”
ほくそ笑む葵。: Aoi let out a smug chuckle.
たったそれだけの為に柚芭を攫ったと云うのか――: She’d abducted Yuzuha just for that—?
袖をまくり上げ、葵と対峙する。: I rolled up my sleeves and faced Aoi.
葵「うふふ――いたぶってあげる」: Aoi: “Ufufu—I'm going to take my time tormenting you.”
舌なめずりをしながら葵は手招きした。: Licking her lips, Aoi beckoned me over.
相手が女だからとか、そう云った遠慮は全くない。: I didn't give a damn that she was a woman.
此奴は――綾音を、琢磨を殺した奴だ――: This was the person who killed Ayane and Takuma—
余裕の表情で葵は蹴りをかわし、反撃の拳を繰り出してくる。: With a look of ease, Aoi dodged the kick and threw a counter-punch.
何とか葵の攻撃をかいくぐり、再び距離を取る。: I barely managed to avoid Aoi’s attack and put some distance between us again.
静かな声で葵が問い掛けてくる。: Aoi questioned me in a quiet voice.
奏介「手前ェが……綾音を殺したからだろっ！？」: Sousuke: “It's because... you killed Ayane, isn't it?!”
葵「ふっ――怒りに任せた拳は当たらないわよ」: Aoi: “Heh—a fist thrown in anger will never hit its mark.”
笑みを崩さぬまま、葵の姿が一瞬消えた。: While her smile never wavered, Aoi’s form vanished for an instant.
足払いをされたと気付いたのは、俺が背中から地面に叩きつけられた後だった。: I only realized I’d been tripped after my back slammed into the ground.
俺の上に馬乗りになり、葵は俺の額に銃を突きつけながら吐き捨てた。: Aoi straddled me, pinning me down as she pressed a gun against my forehead and spat the words out.
葵「こんな男に執着していたかと思うと莫迦らしくなってくるわ」: Aoi: “To think I was once obsessed with a man like this... it makes me feel like a fool.”
葵は俺から銃口を外し――柚芭に向けた。: Aoi shifted the muzzle from me—and pointed it at Yuzuha.
葵は柚芭に向けて言い放った。: Aoi barked the command at Yuzuha.
葵「貴方は特に動かない方がいいわよ。下で動かれたら――あたし、感じちゃって引き金: Aoi: “You especially shouldn't move. If you thrash around down there—I might just feel it and pull the trigger... fufu, don't give me that look.”
俺の上で腰をくねらせる葵。: Aoi writhed her hips on top of me.
葵「ふふっ……なんなら妹さんの前でしてみる？ 見られると燃えるんじゃないかしら…: Aoi: “Fufu... why don't we try it right here in front of your sister? I imagine being watched would only make it more exciting... right?”
葵「うふ……妬いてるの？ 可愛いわね――殺しちゃおうかしら」: Aoi: “Ufufu... are you jealous? How sweet—maybe I should just kill you.”
銃声が響き、柚芭が悲鳴をあげた。: A gunshot rang out, and Yuzuha screamed.
葵も声を挙げる。葵の持つ銃口からは煙が出ていない。: Aoi cried out as well. No smoke was coming from the muzzle of her own gun.
葵の注意が俺から離れる。: Aoi’s attention shifted away from me.
葵の拳銃を掴み、腕ごとねじり上げる。: I grabbed Aoi’s pistol and twisted her arm.
葵の人差し指があり得ない方向に曲がった。: Aoi’s index finger snapped in an impossible direction.
銃を奪い取ろうと手を伸ばす。: I reached out to snatch the gun away.
蹴りを入れられ、俺は床を転がる。: A kick sent me rolling across the floor.
葵「このっ……赦さないっ！！」: Aoi: “I'll... I'll never forgive you for this!!”
苦悶の表情を浮かべつつ、葵が立ち上がる。: Faced twisted in agony, Aoi scrambled to her feet.
駆け寄ってくる柚芭を手で制する。: I held Yuzuha back with my hand as she tried to rush over.
目の端で葵が動くのが見えた。: Out of the corner of my eye, I saw Aoi move.
――最初、何が起こったのか判らなかった。: —At first, I had no idea what had happened.
銃声に振り向いた時、葵が左手に持っていた拳銃は天井を向き、銃口から煙を吐き出して: When I whirled around at the sound of the gunshot, the pistol in Aoi’s left hand was pointing toward the ceiling, smoke pouring from the muzzle.
葵の口端から鮮血が垂れ落ちる。: Blood began to spill from the corner of Aoi’s mouth.
葵の胸元から、鈍色に光る細い金属片が飛び出していた。: The narrow, dull-gleaming tip of a metal blade erupted from the center of Aoi’s chest.
それが日本刀の切っ先である事を気付くのに、俺は暫しの時間を要した。: It took me several seconds to realize it was the tip of a Japanese katana.
葵は鎬を握り締め、血走った目で後方を睨む。: Aoi gripped the blade, her eyes bloodshot as she glared behind her.
葵の背後には、日本刀の柄を握り締めたマスター――護堂の姿があった。: Behind Aoi stood the Master—Godou—his hands gripping the hilt of the sword.
低く呟いた護堂の言葉は、俺にはよく聴き取れなかった。: Godou murmured something in a low voice, but I couldn't catch the words.
葵の身体が頽れる。: Aoi’s body slumped to the floor.
訳が解らない。: I couldn't make sense of it.
何故突然葵を斬りつけたのか――: Why had he suddenly cut Aoi down—?
刃を濡らす血潮を拭い取り、護堂は刀を鞘に戻しながら言った。: Wiping the blood from the blade, Godou spoke as he returned the sword to its sheath.
奏介「――遅くなった、じゃねぇよ。何であんたが此処に居るんだよ」: Sousuke: “'Too late' my ass. What the hell are you doing here?”
行方を眩ましておいて――何故此処に。: He’d vanished without a trace—so why show up here now?
護堂は言葉少なに語り出す。: Godou began to speak, his words sparse.
護堂「その過程で色々あってな――暫く身を隠していた」: Godou: “A lot happened during the process—I had to go into hiding for a while.”
俺のポケットの中には、葵の寝室で見つけた銀のロケットが入っている。: The silver locket I’d found in Aoi’s room was still in my pocket.
幼い葵と共に写っていた護堂。あの写真が示す物は――: Godou, pictured with a young Aoi. The truth that photo implied—
奏介「……それにあんたは、俺が殺したとか云われてる女を殺した可能性だってあるんだ: Sousuke: “...Besides, there's the chance that you were the one who killed the woman they're pinning on me.”
それは千花から聞いた話だ。: That was what I'd heard from Chika.
見間違いかもしれないと千花は言っていたが、まったく疑念は晴れていない。: She’d said she might have been mistaken, but my suspicions hadn't cleared at all.
なおも詰問を続けようとしたとき、久遠が割り込んで護堂に抱きついた。: As I was about to continue my questioning, Qwon cut in and threw her arms around Godou.
久遠「ええ――心配おかけしました」: Kuon: “Yes—I am sorry for causing you concern.”
殊勝に久遠は護堂に対し頭を下げ、こちらを向く。: Qwon bowed her head politely to Godou, then turned to face me.
久遠「彼は私を《清鳳会》の手から救い出してくれました。以来頻繁に連絡を取るように: Kuon: “He was the one who rescued me from the hands of the Seifuu-kai. I have been in frequent contact with him ever since, but—”
久遠は小さく頭を振り、不意に貌を上げた。: Qwon gave a small shake of her head, then suddenly looked up.
その視線の先――座り込んだ柚芭の側に、璃宝がしゃがみ込んでいた。: Riho was crouching beside Yuzuha, who was slumped on the floor.
璃宝「……マスターに無理を言って付いてきたのよ。奏介、マスターの言う事は本当よ―: Riho: “...I forced the Master to let me come along. Sousuke, what the Master is saying is true—probably.”
璃宝「奏介が出て行った後に、マスターが戻ってきたの。あの捕まえたふたりはマスター: Riho: “The Master came back right after you left. It seems those two we caught didn't even know who the Master was.”
璃宝「マスターがあのふたりに彼らの計画を白状させて、柚芭ちゃんまで危険な目に遭わ: Riho: “The Master made those two confess their plans, and he found out they were planning to put Yuzuha-chan in danger.”
璃宝「それで急いでアパートへ行ったんだけど、もぬけの空で――マスターは何か見つけ: Riho: “We rushed to the apartment, but it was empty—the Master found something and said he was coming here, so I followed him.”
璃宝の口調に嘘は感じられない。: I didn't sense any lies in Riho’s tone.
それにしても解せないのは護堂の行動だ。: Still, Godou’s actions didn't make sense.
突然店へ戻ったのも、此処へ現れたのも。: His sudden return to the shop, and his appearance here.
おかしいと云えば久遠の態度もだ。: And Qwon’s behavior was strange too.
普段は感情の起伏もなく、淡々としている久遠が笑みを浮かべてまで護堂へ懐いている。: The usually emotionless, indifferent Qwon was actually smiling as she clung to Godou.
内心の動揺を表に出さないよう努めて応える。: I answered, trying my best not to let my internal confusion show.
久遠「――これから彼女たちには地下道を通って戻って貰います」: Kuon: “—I am going to have them return through the underground passage now.”
久遠は璃宝と柚芭を指して言う。: Qwon spoke, pointing to Riho and Yuzuha.
久遠「奏介には私の作業を手伝っていただきます」: Kuon: “I would like you to assist me with my task, Sousuke.”
いつもの調子ながら、久遠の声には有無を言わせぬ強い意志が感じ取れた。: Though her tone was its usual self, I could sense a powerful, unyielding will in Qwon’s voice.
柚芭「お兄ちゃん……戻らないの？」: Yuzuha: “Onii-chan... you aren't coming back with us?”
眉尻を下げ、心細そうな表情で柚芭が訊ねてくる。: Yuzuha questioned me, her brow furrowed with anxiety.
俺は柚芭に歩み寄り、その頭を軽く抱き寄せる。: I walked over to Yuzuha and lightly pulled her head into an embrace.
柚芭「でもっ……お兄ちゃんが行く必要はあるの？」: Yuzuha: “But... is it really necessary for you to go, Onii-chan?”
今にも泣き出しそうな表情で柚芭は言う。: Yuzuha said, her expression looking like she was on the verge of tears.
久遠「――あくまで私は奏介に手伝いを頼んでいるだけです。……この莫迦げた犯罪を止: Kuon: “—I am merely asking for Sousuke’s assistance. ...Assistance in stopping this ridiculous crime.”
久遠はじっと俺の眼を見つめてくる。: Qwon stared me straight in the eye.
――彼女から、何か焦げたような臭いがした。: —I caught a faint, scorched scent coming from her.
奏介「……お前な、そう云われて引き下がれと思うか？」: Sousuke: “...Listen to you. You think you can say that and expect me to just back down?”
見透かされていると云う事か。: So she had seen right through me.
しかし、《清鳳会》の犯罪を止めると云う話は、確かに俺の望む事でもあった。: But stopping the Seifuu-kai’s crimes was indeed something I wanted to achieve.
綾音や琢磨の無念を晴らす為にも――: To settle the scores for Ayane and Takuma—
琢磨の事は、柚芭に言えない。: I couldn't tell Yuzuha about Takuma.
言えるはずがない。: There was no way I could.
無言で柚芭の身体を抱き締めた。: I silently pulled Yuzuha’s body into a tight embrace.
か細い声で、柚芭は俺の耳元で囁いた。: Yuzuha whispered the words into my ear in a thin, fragile voice.
柚芭と璃宝は俺が此処へ来た時の地下道を通って帰って行った。: Yuzuha and Riho headed back through the underground passage I used when I first arrived here.
懐中電灯を持って行ったから迷う事はないと思うが、少々心配ではあった。: I gave them a flashlight so they shouldn't get lost, but I couldn't help feeling a bit worried.
本来なら地上の出口まで送ってやるべきなのだろうが――: Under normal circumstances, I probably should have escorted them all the way to the surface exit, but—
久遠「奏介、行きますよ」: Kuon: “Sousuke, it is time to go.”
久遠に急かされ、俺は彼女の後を追って地下室の外へ出た。: Urged on by Qwon, I followed after her and stepped out of the basement.
久遠「――《清鳳会》と《逢禅寺商会》はほぼ同一の組織です。社会的には《逢禅寺商会: Kuon: “—The Seihoukai and the Ouzenji Trading Company are essentially the same organization. Publicly, they operate as the Ouzenji Trading Company, while the Seihoukai handles the work that cannot be brought into the light.”
廊下に出て、久遠は静かに話し出した。: Once we reached the hallway, Qwon began to speak in a quiet, steady voice.
久遠「どちらも束ねるのは逢禅寺清正。元軍人で現在の陸軍上層部にも貌が利き、退役後: Kuon: “Both are unified under Ouzenji Kiyomasa. A former military man, he is said to have significant influence within the current Army high command and continues to wield immense power even after his retirement.”
奏介「《清鳳会》のボスと同じ野郎か……」: Sousuke: “So he's the same bastard who runs the Seihoukai...”
護堂「……そうだ。《清鳳会》の方は普段――あの女に任せていたようだがな」: Godou: “...Precisely. Though it seems he usually left the management of the Seihoukai... to that woman.”
一瞬護堂が言葉を詰まらせる。: For a brief moment, Godou’s voice faltered.
護堂の事はまだ信用できなかった。: I still couldn't bring myself to trust Godou.
葵と写っている写真の事もあるし、千花の目撃した現場の事もある。: Between that photo of him with Aoi and the scene Chika witnessed, there was too much doubt.
ただ――聡明な久遠が信じているようだからそれに従っているだけだ。: However—since the brilliant Qwon seemed to believe in him, I simply followed her lead.
久遠「此処のエレベータは最上階の社長室まで直通になっています」: Kuon: “The elevator here leads directly to the President’s office on the top floor.”
奏介「……よく知っているな」: Sousuke: “...You certainly know your way around.”
久遠「おじさまが調べていましたから。それに私も一時期此処で囚われていました」: Kuon: “My uncle had investigated it. Besides, I was also held captive here for a time.”
いつものように淀みなく答える久遠。: Qwon answered without a hint of hesitation, as she always did.
久遠「そして彼らの命令で作らされていたものが人を狂わせる機械――《リフ＝ラフ》で: Kuon: “And the thing they forced me to create is a machine that drives people to madness—the Rif-Raf.”
その名前は初めて聞いた気がする。: I felt as though I was hearing that name for the first time.
奏介「そいつが――一連の事件を引き起こしたんだな」: Sousuke: “So that thing—that’s what triggered the whole string of incidents.”
久遠「――ええ。《リフ＝ラフ》が使われた以上、その責任の一端は私にあります」: Kuon: “—Yes. Since the Rif-Raf was used, a portion of the responsibility lies with me.”
久遠「ですから《リフ＝ラフ》を破壊し、これ以上被害を出さない為にも私たちは行かね: Kuon: “That is why we must go. To destroy the Rif-Raf and ensure no further victims are claimed.”
それは奴――琢磨も望んでいただろう。: That’s likely what he—what Takuma would have wanted, too.
エレベータの扉が開き、俺たちはそれに乗り込んだ。: The elevator doors slid open, and we stepped inside.
いつの間にか時間は過ぎていたらしく、外は闇に包まれていた。: Time had slipped away without me realizing it; outside, the world was swallowed by darkness.
一面に広がる大東京の夜景を見下ろし、溜息を吐く。: I looked down at the sprawling night view of Great Tokyo and let out a heavy sigh.
こんな部屋で仕事をするとは――趣味が悪い。: To do work in a room like this—it showed wretched taste.
他人を見下すことしか考えていないようにも思えてしまう。: It felt like the kind of place built by someone who thought of nothing but looking down on others.
久遠「――奏介、呆けていないで探してください」: Kuon: “—Sousuke, do not just stand there in a daze. Please, help me search.”
部屋の横の壁に据え付けられた本棚に向かっていた久遠が口を開く。: Qwon spoke as she turned toward the bookshelves built into the side wall.
奏介「何を探せばいいんだ？」: Sousuke: “What exactly am I looking for?”
久遠「《リフ＝ラフ》の本体、或いはそれに関係する書類を見つけてください」: Kuon: “Find the Rif-Raf unit itself, or perhaps any documents related to it.”
聳え立つ本棚を眺める。: I stared up at the towering bookshelves.
厳めしい装丁の分厚い本がずらりと並び、ひと目見ただけでは何の本かも判らない。日本: Row after row of thick, imposing volumes were lined up; at a glance, I couldn't even tell what they were. It wasn't just Japanese; there seemed to be books in English, German, and French as well.
久遠「書籍は無視しても構いません。書類を挟んだファイルか封筒のような物を探してく: Kuon: “You may ignore the books. Look for things like files or envelopes containing documents.”
久遠「《リフ＝ラフ》の本体は恐らく此処にはないでしょうから」: Kuon: “The Rif-Raf unit itself is likely not here.”
護堂「逢禅寺が持っているだろうな。猜疑心の強い男だ、あれだけの物を他人に預けるよ: Godou: “Ouzenji probably has it. He’s a deeply paranoid man; he wouldn't dream of entrusting something of that magnitude to anyone else.”
奏介「自分に向けられる事を畏れていた――？」: Sousuke: “Was he afraid it would be turned against him—?”
久遠「彼程の人物ならば操られる事はないと思いますが――護堂」: Kuon: “I doubt a man of his stature would be so easily manipulated, but—Godou.”
久遠が何かを見つけたらしく、護堂を名字で呼んだ。: Qwon seemed to have found something, addressing Godou by his surname.
本棚の一角、写真がいくつか飾られている棚を指して久遠は護堂に指示した。: Qwon gestured toward a section of the bookshelf where several photographs were displayed, giving Godou his instructions.
久遠「奏介はあちらをお願いします」: Kuon: “Sousuke, please take that side over there.”
久遠が俺の手を引き、反対側の壁に据えられた棚へ連れて行かれる。: Qwon took my hand and led me to the shelves on the opposite wall.
此処も分厚い本ばかりだ。: This side was also filled with nothing but thick, heavy books.
奏介「書類みたいなのがあるとは思えねえが――」: Sousuke: “I don't think I'm going to find anything like a document here—”
戸惑いつつ久遠の方を向いたとき、部屋の扉が音をたてて開いた。: Just as I turned back toward Qwon in confusion, the door to the room swung open with a heavy thud.
店内には、いつもの面々しか居なかった。: Inside the shop, there was no one but the usual faces.
綾音が軽く言葉を掛けて来て、隣の席を指差す。: Ayane called out to me softly, gesturing toward the seat next to her.
綾音の向こうに座る美華夏に尋ねる。: I asked Mikage, who was sitting on the other side of Ayane.
美華夏「その前に、千花ちゃんが話したい事があるらしいわ」: Mikana: “Before that, it seems Chika-chan has something she wants to talk about.”
カウンタにいる千花に視線を向ける。: I turned my gaze toward Chika, who was behind the counter.
千花「……はい。少し疲れた様子でしたが、元気そうでした。それで、すぐに久遠ちゃん: Chika: “...Yes. He looked a bit exhausted, but he seemed well enough. And then, he immediately took Qwon-chan and left again for somewhere else.”
そういえば、久遠の姿はない。: Now that she mentioned it, Qwon was nowhere to be seen.
千花「久遠ちゃんから、玖藤さんへの伝言があります。『何処へ行けばいいかは、貴方な: Chika: “I have a message for Kudou-san from Qwon-chan. She said, ‘You of all people should know where we need to go.’”
奏介「俺が……解る場所……」: Sousuke: “A place... that I would know...”
久遠が行きそうで、俺も知っている場所――: A place where Qwon would likely go, and that I knew as well—
綾音「たぶん……美華夏さんが調べてきた処だと思うの」: Ayane: “I think... it’s probably the place Mikage-san was investigating.”
その綾音の言葉に、美華夏を見る。: At Ayane’s words, I looked over at Mikage.
美華夏「……相馬葵について調べてきたわよ。同じ名前の人がある企業に勤めていたの。: Mikana: “...I did some digging into Souma Aoi. A person with the same name was employed at a certain company. —Until last year.”
美華夏「本人かどうか判らないけれど、相馬葵と云う人物が《逢禅寺商会》という処に勤: Mikana: “I can't be certain if it’s her, but a person named Souma Aoi was working for a place called the Ouzenji Trading Company.”
思わず綾音の貌を見る。: I instinctively looked at Ayane’s face.
綾音「それって……あそこで見たのだよね？」: Ayane: “That’s... the name we saw back there, right?”
葵が使用していた旧御巫邸の部屋で見つけた書類に書かれていた会社名だ。: It was the company name written on the documents we found in the room Aoi used at the old Mikanagi estate.
綾音「やっぱり……黒幕なのかな？」: Ayane: “I knew it... Are they the masterminds?”
美華夏「《逢禅寺商会》は九段下に本社を構え、軍を相手にした取引で最近急激に業績を: Mikana: “The Ouzenji Trading Company has its headquarters in Kudanshita. It’s a company that’s seen a sudden, massive surge in performance recently through dealings with the military. They seem to have their hands in everything from real estate to finance.”
奏介「……軍とはどのくらいの関わりがある？」: Sousuke: “...How deep is their connection to the military?”
美華夏「本社ビルの隣に軍人会館があると云えば充分でしょ？」: Mikana: “Isn't the fact that the Army Hall is right next to their headquarters building enough for you?”
奏介「――で、綾音は其処へ久遠たちが行ったと思うんだな？」: Sousuke: “—And, Ayane, you think that’s where Qwon and the others went?”
綾音「恐らく――久遠ちゃんは自分の決着を付けに行ったと思うの。あの女の人の処には: Ayane: “Most likely—I think Qwon-chan went to settle things for herself. That woman didn't have that machine—the Rif-Raf thing—at her place.”
綾音「たぶんその、黒幕の処に――《リフ＝ラフ》がある」: Ayane: “I bet the mastermind has it—the Rif-Raf is at their place.”
奏介「……久遠はそれを取り戻しに……？」: Sousuke: “...And Qwon went to get it back...?”
綾音「……ううん。きっと――《リフ＝ラフ》を壊しに」: Ayane: “...No. I’m sure—she went to destroy it.”
奏介「だがそれでも……何故マスターが……」: Sousuke: “But even so... why would the Master...?”
綾音「前に久遠ちゃんが言ってたでしょ？ マスターも巻き込まれたって。……たぶんそ: Ayane: “Qwon-chan told us before, didn't she? That the Master was involved too. ...It’s probably because the Master has a deep connection to that organization.”
綾音は胸元に下げられた銀のロケットを弄る。: Ayane toyed with the silver locket hanging around her neck.
はて――今までそんな物を付けていただろうか。: Wait—had she always been wearing something like that?
綾音「……本人に聞かないと判らないけれどね」: Ayane: “...Well, we won't know for sure until we ask the man himself.”
綾音が勢いを付けて立ち上がる。: Ayane stood up with a burst of energy.
奏介「当たり前だろ！？ もうこれ以上お前を危険な目に遭わせたくねえんだよ！！」: Sousuke: “Isn't it obvious?! I don't want to put you in any more danger than I already have!!”
綾音「じゃあ奏介は、そのビルに見つからずに入る方法を考えてるの？」: Ayane: “Then, Sousuke, have you thought of a way to get into that building without being spotted?”
綾音「そんなんじゃダメだよっ！ わたしならちゃんと中に連れて行ってあげられるんだ: Ayane: “That’s not good enough! I’m the one who can actually lead you inside!”
奏介「……だったら今その方法を教えろよ」: Sousuke: “...Then just tell me the method now.”
綾音「……教えたって無駄だもん。奏介ひとりじゃ絶対にできないし」: Ayane: “...It’s useless even if I tell you. There’s no way you can do it alone, Sousuke.”
奏介「……本当に大丈夫なんだろうな？」: Sousuke: “...Are you absolutely sure about this?”
……果てしなく不安だ。: ...I felt an endless wave of anxiety.
不安ではあるが――彼女を何としてでも守り通さなければならない。: Anxious as I was—I had to protect her, no matter what.
それが俺の――もしかすると自分の無実を証明する事よりも大切な使命だから。: Because that was my mission—perhaps even more important than proving my own innocence.
そう言うと、綾音は物陰に隠れながらビルの入口――正確にはその隣にある通用口のよう: With those words, Ayane stayed hidden in the shadows as she approached the building's entrance—or more accurately, a small side door that looked like a service entrance.
綾音が遠くで手招きをしている。: Ayane signaled to me from a distance.
綾音は不思議そうに――訝しげに首を傾げていた。: Ayane was tilting her head, looking puzzled—even suspicious.
扉の取っ手に手をかけながら綾音は呟く。: Ayane whispered as she placed her hand on the door handle.
綾音「これはこれで好都合なんだけどね……」: Ayane: “It’s convenient for us, but still...”
綾音「……その時は、わたしが何とかするよ」: Ayane: “...If that’s the case, I’ll handle it.”
僅かに扉を開き、中の様子を窺いながら綾音は言う。: Ayane said, opening the door just a crack to peer inside.
綾音が俺の前に立ち、ずんずんと歩いていく。: Ayane took the lead, walking forward with purpose.
綾音が口元に指をあて、進行方向を指し示す。: Ayane pressed a finger to her lips and pointed ahead.
綾音が無言で後退するよう促してくる。: Ayane silently gestured for us to retreat.
綾音「――ううん、こんな時の為に方法を考えていたの」: Ayane: “—No, I’ve already thought of a way for times like this.”
やけに自信ありげに綾音が言う。: Ayane spoke with a surprising amount of confidence.
綾音「人に見つかったら、残業してる人にお弁当を届けに来たんです、って行こうと思っ: Ayane: “I figured if we got caught, I’d just say I was here to deliver a lunch box to someone working late, but—”
俺の表情を見たのか、綾音の声が尻すぼみになっていく。: Seeing the expression on my face, Ayane’s voice trailed off.
そんな方法でうまく行く筈がないだろうが。: There was no way a plan like that would ever work.
綾音が俺の口を手で塞いでくる。: Ayane suddenly covered my mouth with her hand.
足音が遠ざかっていく。: The sound of footsteps faded into the distance.
俺の身体に密着していた綾音が貌を上げる。: Pressed tightly against me, Ayane looked up at my face.
エレベータホールの照明が消えている。: The lights in the elevator hall had been turned off.
綾音は俺の手を引いてエレベータへ駆け寄る。: Ayane pulled my hand and we ran toward the elevator.
すぐに扉が開き、綾音は俺をその中へ押し込み、自分も入ってきた。: The doors opened immediately; Ayane pushed me inside and followed after me.
綾音「あれ……？ 一階と、地下と二十階しかない……」: Ayane: “Wait... what? There’s only the first floor, the basement, and the twentieth floor...”
綾音が行先階の表示を見て不思議そうに呟く。: Ayane whispered in confusion as she looked at the floor display.
奏介「地下か二十階か――どっちだ？」: Sousuke: “The basement or the twentieth floor—which is it?”
迷う事なく綾音は二十と書かれたボタンを押した。: Without a moment’s hesitation, Ayane pressed the button labeled twenty.
綾音「間違ってたら下に降りればいいんだから」: Ayane: “If we’re wrong, we can just come back down.”
軽い振動と共に身体が床に押しつけられ、俺たちは上階へと運ばれていった。: With a light vibration, my body was pressed against the floor as we were carried to the upper levels.
がたがたと音を立て、扉が左右に開く。: With a rattling sound, the doors slid open.
奏介「エレベータが此処までしかなかったんだから、そうなんじゃねえか？」: Sousuke: “The elevator only went this far, so I’d guess so.”
振り向いてエレベータの階数表示の針を見る。やはり二十階が一番右端に来ている。: I turned back to look at the floor indicator needle. Sure enough, it was at the far right on the twentieth floor.
針が動き、徐々に下がっていく。: The needle moved, gradually starting to descend.
誰かが下でボタンを押したのだろう。地下に行かないのであれば、此処へ来るしか考えら: Someone downstairs must have pressed the button. If they weren't going to the basement, the only other possibility was that they were coming here.
俺たちは無人の廊下を駆け出した。: We bolted down the deserted hallway.
廊下が続いているばかりで、身を隠せそうな処は何もない。: The corridor just stretched on and on; there was nowhere to hide.
その先に扉がある。: There was a door just ahead.
俺たちは一気に扉を開け、部屋の中に転がり込んだ。: We burst through the door and tumbled into the room.
飛び出した其処には――: In the room we had just burst into—
腕一本で吊り上げられ、美華夏が苦悶の表情を浮かべている。: Mikage was being hoisted up by a single arm, her face twisted in agony.
美華夏を吊り上げている大男――逢禅寺は隻眼をこちらへ向けてきた。: The massive man holding Mikage—Ouzenji—turned his single eye toward us.
射抜くような視線の迫力に俺は気圧される。: The sheer power of his piercing gaze made me recoil.
低い声ながら、逢禅寺の声音は張りがあり、腹に響いてくる。: His voice was low, yet it carried a resonant power that vibrated in my gut.
逢禅寺「特に護堂――貴様、軍属の頃から目を掛けておったものを、よもやこのような形: Houzenji: “Especially you, Godou—I’ve watched over you since your days in the service, only for you to betray me like this—you ungrateful wretch...”
護堂「――初めに裏切ったのはどちらだ」: Godou: “—Which of us was the first to betray the other?”
護堂が一歩前に出、久遠の前に立つ。: Godou took a step forward, standing in front of Qwon.
護堂「御国の為と思えばこそ貴方の思想にも賛同してきたのだが――私欲に走り、財を成: Godou: “I supported your ideals only because I believed they were for the sake of the nation—but your obsession with running after your own greed and amassing wealth has stripped you of the right to be called a patriot.”
護堂「故に――貴方とは袂を分かったのだ」: Godou: “Therefore—I have parted ways with you.”
逢禅寺は口元を歪める。: Ouzenji’s lips curled into a distorted sneer.
逢禅寺「我国が欧米列強と肩を並べ、此を打ち破るには、より強固な軍事態勢を整えねば: Houzenji: “If this nation is to stand as an equal to the Western powers and crush them, we must establish a more robust military state. To achieve that, the very nature of our politics must be transformed.”
逢禅寺「――謂わば昭和維新を断行する為の資金である」: Houzenji: “—These are the funds required to carry out the Showa Restoration, so to speak.”
護堂「我々が活動してきて何が変わったと云う。徒に国を混乱に陥れ、あたら若い者を散: Godou: “And what exactly has changed after all our activities? You have done nothing but throw the country into needless chaos and cause young men to throw their lives away for nothing.”
逢禅寺「――逝った者共の為にも我等は前へ進まねばならぬのだ」: Houzenji: “—For the sake of those who have passed, we must continue to march forward.”
耐えきれなくなり、俺は護堂を押しのけて前へ出た。: Unable to take it any longer, I pushed past Godou and stepped forward.
逢禅寺「ふむ――お前か。折角目を掛けてやったものを――此奴等に乗せられたか」: Houzenji: “Hmph—so it’s you. I took quite a liking to you, and yet—you let yourself be led astray by these people.”
逢禅寺は掴んだままの美華夏をちらりと見やる。: Ouzenji cast a fleeting glance at Mikage, whom he still held captive.
逢禅寺「――良かろう。儂としても婦女子に危害を加えるつもりはない」: Houzenji: “—Very well. I have no intention of harming women and children myself.”
逢禅寺が美華夏の身体から手を放し――俺へ向けて突き飛ばした。: Ouzenji released his grip on Mikage—and shoved her toward me.
慌てて抱き留める。: I scrambled to catch her in my arms.
喉が絞まっていたのだろう、美華夏は咳き込みながら俺に抱きついてくる。: Her throat must have been constricted; Mikage clung to me, coughing violently.
逢禅寺「――殺し合うのは別であるがな」: Houzenji: “—Though killing each other is a different matter entirely.”
久遠の緊迫した声に俺は振り返る。: Qwon’s tense voice made me whip around.
護堂が刀を鞘走らせた。: Godou’s blade cleared its scabbard in a flash.
――奴が取り出したのは、これまで見たこともないような銃のような物だった。: —The thing he pulled out was a gun-like object the likes of which I had never seen before.
これは……あの時の――: This... it was just like that time—
気をしっかり持てと言おうとした処で膝が床に付いた。: I tried to tell her to stay strong, but my knees hit the floor.
美華夏の身体を抱きかかえたまま床に蹲る。: I slumped to the ground, still holding Mikage.
あの悪夢が脳裏に甦る。: That nightmare was resurfacing in my mind.
このままでは――俺は、美華夏を殺してしまう――: At this rate—I’m going to kill Mikage—
久遠も膝を付いている。: Qwon was also down on her knees.
額に脂汗を浮かべ、眉根を寄せつつもこちらを見ている。: Beads of sweat formed on her forehead, and her brow was furrowed in pain, yet she still looked toward us.
久遠「――《リフ＝ラフ》は低周波音で精神に影響を及ぼす兵器です。奏介のピアノの旋: Kuon: “—The Rif-Raf is a weapon that influences the mind through low-frequency sound. Since it incorporates the melodies of your piano, Sousuke, it should have little effect on you.”
奏介「ンな……事、言われても……っ」: Sousuke: “Even if... you say that... gh...”
河豚の毒は自分に効かないと云う事か。: Was it like pufferfish poison not working on the fish itself?
それにしては――矢鱈と頭が痛む。: Even so—my head was throbbed with excruciating pain.
久遠「意志をはっきりと持てば――操られる事はありません」: Kuon: “If you maintain a firm will—you will not be controlled.”
《リフ＝ラフ》の出力が上がったのか、久遠が苦悶の悲鳴を上げた。: The output of the Rif-Raf must have increased; Qwon let out a scream of agony.
見れば護堂すらも膝を付いている。: I saw that even Godou had been forced to his knees.
俺にも、不快な波が押し寄せてくる。: Unpleasant waves washed over me as well.
久遠が先程言っていた俺に備わった決定的な違い――それが自分の音楽だからと云う理由: The decisive difference Qwon had mentioned—the reason it was less effective on me was likely because it was my own music.
だとすれば、やはり俺は操られなどしなかった訳で――: If that was the case, then I really hadn't been controlled back then—
だからといって、今この状態では――何も出来ない。: But even so, in this state—I couldn't do anything.
突然、美華夏が腕を振り上げた。: Suddenly, Mikage swung her arm up.
息を荒げ、俺の腕から逃れ出ようと藻掻く美華夏。: Her breathing was ragged as she struggled to break free from my arms.
これは――《リフ＝ラフ》の効果が顕れているのか――？: Is this—the effect of the Rif-Raf—?
暴れる美華夏を必死に止めようとするも、尋常ではない膂力で俺を引きはがそうとする。: I desperately tried to stop her as she thrashed about, but she attempted to tear herself away with an inhuman strength.
俺に掴まれたまま本棚にぶつかり、棚から本やペンが落ちてくる。: Still gripped in my arms, she collided with the bookshelf, causing books and pens to tumble from the shelves.
――皮肉なことに、美華夏が暴れているお陰で俺は冷静で居られた。: —Ironically, Mikage’s violent struggle was the only thing keeping me sane.
美華夏の手に握られたペンが、俺の左手に突き刺さった。: The pen Mikage was clutching stabbed into my left hand.
掌に激痛が奔る。痛みを堪え、美華夏の手を掴む。この手は絶対に放すわけにはいかなか: Agony surged through my palm. Enduring the pain, I grabbed Mikage’s hand. This was one hand I could never let go of.
刺さったペンが捻られ、肉が捩れる。: She twisted the embedded pen, mangling the flesh.
あまりの痛みに、美華夏を拘束する力が緩んだ。: The pain was so intense that my grip on her loosened.
美華夏が俺に馬乗りになる。: Mikage climbed on top of me.
美華夏の手が、俺の首にかかる――: Her hands reached for my throat—
美華夏の腕を除けようとして、彼女の表情に気が付く。: As I tried to push her arms away, I noticed her expression.
俺の首を渾身の力で絞め付けながら、瞳だけは正気の、いつもの美華夏の眼だった。: While she was strangling me with all her might, her eyes were sane—the eyes of the Mikage I knew.
ごめんなさいと、目だけで彼女は謝ってくる。: With her eyes alone, she was pleading for forgiveness.
それを見てしまうと――突き飛ばしてまで拘束を逃れようとする気力が喪われていく。: Seeing that—all my will to escape her grasp by force vanished.
全く――これが《リフ＝ラフ》の力なのか。: Truly—is this the power of the Rif-Raf?
俺の身に《リフ＝ラフ》の効果は顕れにくいと云われても、ここで気を緩めてしまえば操: Even if I was told the Rif-Raf was less effective on me, if I let my guard down now, I’d be controlled—and I might end up killing someone I cared about after all.
美華夏の口から俺の名前が洩れる。: My name slipped from Mikage’s lips.
俺は殺される訳にはいかない。: I can't let myself be killed.
美華夏に――俺を殺させる訳にはいかない。: I can't let Mikage—be the one to kill me.
言葉にならない声。: Her voice was a wordless cry.
逢禅寺の高笑いが響く。: Ouzenji’s loud laughter echoed through the room.
――視界の端で、護堂が動くのが見えた。: —In the corner of my vision, I saw Godou move.
その瞬間、頭を締め付けられるような感覚が消えた。: In that instant, the sensation of my head being crushed vanished.
気を失い、倒れ込んでくる美華夏の身体を抱き留める。: I caught Mikage’s body as she lost consciousness and slumped forward.
《リフ＝ラフ》を叩き落とした護堂を見る。: I looked at Godou, who had struck the Rif-Raf from Ouzenji’s hand.
憤怒の表情を浮かべる逢禅寺と対峙していた。: He was facing off against a now furious Ouzenji.
護堂も刀を構え、静かに声を発する。: Godou also leveled his blade, his voice calm and steady.
動くことが躊躇われるような、張り詰めた空気。: The air was so taut it made me hesitate to even move.
何か動いてしまえば、それが全ての引金となってしまいそうな気がした。: It felt as though any slight movement would become the trigger for everything.
呼吸すら満足に出来ない空間。: It was a space where I could barely even breathe.
相交わした言葉と共に――ふたりは一気に間合いを詰めた。: With those words exchanged—the two of them closed the distance in an instant.
逢禅寺「この儂に立ち向かおうなど、百年早いわっ！！」: Houzenji: “You're a hundred years too early to be standing against me!!”
――俺如きの理解の範疇を超えた剣戟だった。: —It was a sword-fight beyond my meager understanding.
刃は身体に触れることなく、悉く刃で弾かれ、白い火花を散らす。: The blades never touched their bodies, instead being parried by the other's steel, sending white sparks flying.
大上段からの一撃を支えかね、護堂が膝を付く。: Unable to withstand a overhead strike, Godou was forced to one knee.
何とか出来ないものか。: Isn't there anything I can do?
――ベルトに、葵が使っていた銃を挟んでいた。: —Tucked into my belt was the gun Aoi had been using.
反射的に銃を抜き、背中を向けている逢禅寺に標準を合わせる。: Reflexively, I drew the gun and aimed it at Ouzenji’s back.
久遠「貴方の腕では――当たらない」: Kuon: “With your skill—you will not hit him.”
久遠「――護堂もそのような決着を望まないでしょう」: Kuon: “—Godou would not wish for such a conclusion, either.”
久遠はふたりの剣舞を見つめながら言う。: Qwon spoke as she watched the two dance with their blades.
久遠「当然です。私は彼を信頼していますから」: Kuon: “Of course. I have faith in him.”
奏介「――お前を攫いに来たのにか？」: Sousuke: “—Even though he came to kidnap you?”
――その信頼関係はよく解らない。: —I didn't quite understand that bond of trust.
逢禅寺「護堂ッ！！ 貴様何故儂の計画を邪魔するかっ！」: Houzenji: “Godou!! Why do you continue to obstruct my plan?!”
護堂「――知れた事。貴方の野望は何時か国を滅ぼす」: Godou: “—It’s quite simple. Your ambitions will one day destroy this nation.”
逢禅寺「我が大望を理解出来ぬ者の分際で知った風な口を利くな！我こそは真にこの国の: Houzenji: “Do not speak as if you understand when you cannot even grasp my grand design! I am the only one who truly cares for the future of this country, and I have concluded that controlling the domestic situation is the only path!”
逢禅寺「その為には闇雲に大陸へ攻め入る前に充分な準備を進めねばならぬ。我が役割は: Houzenji: “To that end, we must make sufficient preparations before blindly invading the continent. My role is to unify domestic thought and build a system that can mobilize the entire populace!!”
逢禅寺「その為の《清鳳会》であり、その為の《リフ＝ラフ》であるッ！！ 貴様等大儀: Houzenji: “That is what the Seihoukai is for, and that is what the Rif-Raf is for!! Not that an ordinary man like you, who cannot comprehend a higher purpose, would understand!!”
護堂「――言いたい事はそれだけですかな？」: Godou: “—Is that all you have to say?”
逢禅寺の長口上を、護堂は聞き流したかのようににやりと嗤う。: Godou smirked as if he had just let Ouzenji’s long speech wash over him.
護堂「――大佐殿の仰る事は人の心を無視した物言いであります。人心の掌握を機械に頼: Godou: “—What the Colonel says is a way of speaking that ignores the human heart. To rely on a machine to capture the hearts of the people—”
逢禅寺「小娘の詭弁に惑わされたか護堂ッ！ 《リフ＝ラフ》を作り上げたのは其処の御: Houzenji: “Have you been misled by the girl’s sophistry, Godou?! It was that Mikanagi girl over there who created the Rif-Raf!!”
久遠「――私はただ、求めに応じて制作しただけ。何に利用するかなど――興味はありま: Kuon: “—I simply created it as requested. I had no interest—in how it would be used.”
逢禅寺「貴様程の才知の持ち主で、使用意図が解らぬ筈がなかろうッ！！」: Houzenji: “With a mind like yours, there is no way you didn't understand the intent behind its use!!”
久遠「――下らない事に使うであろうとは理解していました」: Kuon: “—I understood that it would be used for something trivial.”
逢禅寺の刃を弾き、護堂が静かに言う。: Godou spoke calmly as he parried Ouzenji’s blade.
逢禅寺「どうしたぁ！ 動きが鈍くなったようだな護堂！」: Houzenji: “What’s the matter?! Your movements have grown dull, Godou!”
逢禅寺と対等に渡り合っているものの、明らかに護堂の攻撃が少ない。: Though he was fighting Ouzenji on equal terms, Godou’s attacks were clearly fewer.
葵に刺された腕が充分に使えていないのだろう。ほとんど片手で刀を振るっている。: The arm Aoi had stabbed must not have been fully functional. He was wielding his sword almost entirely with one hand.
久遠「――あの程度の怪我如きで護堂が遅れを取るなど有り得ません。それに――」: Kuon: “—It is impossible for Godou to be bested by a mere injury like that. Besides—”
久遠は俺が握っていた拳銃に手を掛け、ゆっくりと下に向けさせた。: Qwon reached out and placed her hand on the pistol I was holding, slowly making me lower it.
久遠「まだ人を殺していない奏介が手を汚す必要はありません」: Kuon: “There is no need for Sousuke, who has yet to kill anyone, to stain his hands.”
久遠は護堂から視線を逸らすことなく頷いた。: Qwon nodded, her gaze never wavering from Godou.
逢禅寺が薙ぎ払い、護堂が転がって避ける。: Ouzenji swung his blade in a wide arc, and Godou rolled to avoid it.
逢禅寺の刃に煽られた燭台が床に倒れた。: A candlestick, struck by Ouzenji’s blade, fell to the floor.
二度、三度、ふたりは刃を交わらせる。: Twice, three times, their blades clashed.
護堂は窓際まで後退していた。: Godou had retreated all the way to the window.
苦悶の表情が俺たちにもはっきりと見えた。: The expression of agony on his face was clearly visible to us.
逢禅寺が大きく踏み込み、逆袈裟に切り上げてくる。: Ouzenji took a great step forward and swung his blade upward in a reverse diagonal slash.
護堂が避けるが、僅かに遅い。: Godou dodged, but he was just a fraction too slow.
――久遠の声は、悲鳴と云うよりもむしろ指示に近いものだった。: —Qwon’s voice was more of an instruction than a scream.
勝利を確信した逢禅寺が袈裟斬りに刀を振り下ろしてくる。: Confident in his victory, Ouzenji swung his blade down in a diagonal slash.
訝しむ逢禅寺に護堂が身体をぶつける。: As Ouzenji hesitated in confusion, Godou slammed his body into him.
体勢を崩しつつも振り下ろした刃は、護堂の肩口で止まる。: Though his stance was broken, the blade Ouzenji swung down stopped at Godou’s shoulder.
一瞬だけ、護堂が久遠の方を見た。: For just a fleeting moment, Godou looked toward Qwon.
護堂が刀を放し、逢禅寺の身体を掴んだ。: Godou released his sword and grabbed Ouzenji’s body.
振り払おうとする逢禅寺をよそに、護堂は右手一本で逢禅寺の身体を宙に舞わせた。: As Ouzenji struggled to break free, Godou used his right arm alone to hoist Ouzenji’s body into the air.
その先は――大東京市を見渡せる巨大な硝子窓。: Ahead of them lay—the massive glass window overlooking Great Tokyo City.
護堂「――盆にはまだ早いですが、共に死出の旅へ参りましょう――大佐殿」: Godou: “—It is a bit early for the Obon festival, but let us depart on our journey to the next world together—Colonel.”
すぐさま久遠が窓際へ駆け寄る。: Qwon immediately rushed to the window.
すぐ外の内堀から水音が響いてきた。: The sound of water splashing rose from the Inner Moat just outside.
闘いの間に床へ倒れた燭台から火が燃え広がり、辺りを赤く炎で染め上げる。: The fire from the candlestick that had fallen during the fight began to spread, staining the area red with flames.
絨毯にまで燃え移った炎が久遠の姿を一瞬覆い隠す。: The fire, which had spread even to the carpet, momentarily obscured Qwon’s silhouette.
俺は未だ意識を失ったままの美華夏の身体を抱きかかえながら久遠に呼びかける。: I called out to Qwon while still holding Mikage, who remained unconscious.
奏介「久遠、逃げるぞっ！！」: Sousuke: “Qwon, we have to get out of here!!”
窓の外を見下ろしていた久遠が振り返る。: Qwon, who had been looking down out the window, turned back.
久遠「私にはまだやらねばならない事があります」: Kuon: “I still have things I must do.”
その微笑みに、俺は一瞬言葉を掛けるのを忘れた。: At her smile, I momentarily forgot what to say.
久遠「――罪は罪。私は償わねばなりません。この争いで命を落とした全ての者に、この: Kuon: “—A sin is a sin. I must atone. To all those who lost their lives in this conflict, to all those whose fates were toyed with, and to the world that was driven mad—”
久遠が割れた硝子窓の淵へ立つ。: Qwon stood at the edge of the shattered glass window.
飛び出そうとしたところで。: Just as I was about to rush toward her.
翌日、俺は久遠に案内されるまま、九段下の内堀沿いへやってきた。: The following day, I followed Qwon’s lead to the edge of the inner moat in Kudanshita.
夏の暑い空気が堀に湛えられた水で冷やされ、心地よい風が吹いてきている。: The sweltering summer air was cooled by the water pooled in the moat, sending a pleasant breeze drifting toward us.
久遠「――あそこに見えるのが、《逢禅寺商会》のビルディングです」: Kuon: “—That building you see over there is the Ouzenji Trading Company.”
久遠が軍人会館の隣に聳える建物を指す。: Qwon pointed toward the structure towering next to the Army Hall.
四階建ての軍人会館が小さく見える。十階――いやそれどころではない高さだ。: The four-story Army Hall looked tiny beside it. It was ten stories—no, even taller than that.
久遠「あそこに逢禅寺清正が――《リフ＝ラフ》があります」: Kuon: “Ouzenji Kiyomasa is there—and so is the Rif-Raf.”
奏介「……どうやって侵入するつもりだ？」: Sousuke: “...How are you planning to break in?”
遠目からでも、ビルの入口付近には人影が多い。軍人会館の方には憲兵の姿まで見える。: Even from this distance, I could see plenty of figures near the building’s entrance. I could even spot Military Police over by the Army Hall.
久遠「正面から堂々と――と言う訳にはいかないでしょうね」: Kuon: “Walking straight through the front door... I imagine that won't be an option.”
久遠はビルに背を向け、靖国神社の方向へ歩き出した。: Qwon turned her back to the building and began walking toward Yasukuni Shrine.
久遠「――付いてきてください、奏介。抜け道を通ることにしましょう」: Kuon: “—Follow me, Sousuke. We shall use a hidden passage.”
神社の裏手、坂と民家が密集している路地へ久遠は入っていく。: Qwon led me into an alley behind the shrine, where the slopes were crowded with a dense cluster of private houses.
奏介「なんだってこんな処へ……」: Sousuke: “Why the hell are we coming here...?”
無論、逢禅寺のビルとは全く反対方向だ。: Of course, this was the exact opposite direction of the Ouzenji building.
久遠「――東京の地下には、幾本もの地下道路が張り巡らされています。これから向かう: Kuon: “—Beneath Tokyo, there is a network of numerous underground roads. We are heading for one of those passages now.”
久遠「戸山の近衛騎兵連隊から道沿いに、皇居北の丸の近衛師団までを結んでいます。緊: Kuon: “It connects the First Imperial Guard Cavalry Regiment in Toyama to the Imperial Guard Division in the Kitanomaru Park, north of the Palace. Service entrances are placed in various locations to allow for rapid movement during emergencies.”
久遠「ここも――そんな非常口のひとつです」: Kuon: “This is one such emergency exit.”
久遠はそう云うと、道端にあるマンホールの蓋の前で立ち止まった。: As Qwon spoke, she came to a halt in front of a manhole cover on the side of the road.
なんの変哲もない下水の蓋だ。訝しみながらも蓋の淵に指をかけ、持ち上げる。: It was a perfectly ordinary sewer lid. Despite my doubts, I hooked my fingers under the edge and heaved it up.
暗い縦坑が口を開いていた。: A dark vertical shaft yawned open before us.
久遠は躊躇なく地下へ降りていこうとする。: Qwon prepared to climb down into the depths without a second thought.
奏介「おい――せめて俺が先に――」: Sousuke: “Hey—at least let me go first—”
中に何があるのか解らないのだ。: I had no idea what was waiting down there.
久遠を先行させるよりも、まず俺が入って安全を確認した方がいい。: Rather than letting Qwon take the lead, I should go in first to make sure it was safe.
縦穴の縁に足をかけ、久遠は言う。: With her feet already at the edge of the shaft, Qwon spoke.
久遠「私がスカートを穿いていますから」: Kuon: “I am wearing a skirt, after all.”
それだけ呟くと、久遠はさっさと中へ降りて行ってしまった。: With that single murmur, she quickly disappeared into the hole.
呆れた溜息をひとつ吐き、俺も久遠に続いて地下へ降りた。: I let out a weary sigh and followed Qwon down into the earth.
――一面漆黒の闇だった。: —It was a world of absolute, pitch-black darkness.
真夏の筈なのに、空気はひんやりと冷たく、下手をすれば肌寒くも感じてしまう。: Despite it being midsummer, the air was clammy and cold; if I wasn't careful, the chill would seep right into my skin.
此処が地下だからだろうか――: I suppose that’s just how it is underground—
袖を引かれる。: I felt a tug on my sleeve.
奏介「……何も見えやしねえぞ」: Sousuke: “...I can't see a damn thing.”
奏介「だったらすぐに使えよ……」: Sousuke: “Then use it from the start, for god’s sake...”
何度も点滅を繰り返させる久遠に呆れつつ洩らす。: I muttered, exasperated by the way she kept making the light flicker on and off.
久遠が灯りを地下道の奥へ向ける。: Qwon pointed the beam deeper into the tunnel.
床もコンクリで固められているのか、歩く度にかつかつと靴音が響いた。: The floor seemed to be hardened concrete as well; every step we took sent the sharp click of our shoes echoing through the passage.
久遠「この地下道路は、緊急時には戦車も走れるよう設計されています。二・二六事件の: Kuon: “This underground road was designed to accommodate tanks in the event of an emergency. I heard that during the February 26 Incident, units that were immobilized by the snow utilized this very passage.”
久遠「軍人会館とも繋がっているので戒厳司令部が置かれたのも納得できますね」: Kuon: “It is also connected to the Army Hall, so it makes sense that the Martial Law Headquarters was established there.”
奏介「……此処で誰かと鉢合わせする事はないのか？」: Sousuke: “...Is there a chance we'll run into someone else down here?”
久遠「ほとんど有り得ないでしょう。軍内部でも一部の者しか知りませんし、入口も厳重: Kuon: “It is highly unlikely. Only a handful of people within the military are aware of its existence, and the entrances are strictly sealed.”
久遠「――私たちが入ってきたマンホールのように忘れられた処も多くあるようですが」: Kuon: “—Though many seem to have been forgotten, much like the manhole we used to enter.”
久遠「軍内部の粛正や異動などで知る者も少なくなっているのでしょう」: Kuon: “I imagine those with knowledge of it have dwindled due to purges and transfers within the military.”
久遠は話をしながら前へ進む。: Qwon continued forward as she spoke.
久遠「逢禅寺のビルディングはこの地下道路の側道を封鎖して地下室として利用していま: Kuon: “Ouzenji has sealed off a side road of this underground network to use as his building’s basement. It seems he uses it to store things that should not be seen by the public.”
久遠「そこからは直通のエレベータが最上階の社長室まで延びています。非常用の経路と: Kuon: “From there, a direct elevator extends all the way to the President’s office on the top floor. It appears he hasn't even told the Trading Company employees about it, keeping it as an emergency route.”
奏介「……久遠は何故そんな事まで知っているんだ？」: Sousuke: “...How do you know so much about this, Qwon?”
久遠「――内通者が居たからです。……さあ、着きましたよ」: Kuon: “—Because there was an informant. ...Now, we have arrived.”
久遠は会話を切り上げるかのように、懐中電灯で途の先を指し示した。: As if to cut the conversation short, Qwon pointed the flashlight at the end of the path.
測道へ行く通路だろうか、コンクリの壁ではなく、木の板でふさがれている一角があった: Likely a passage leading to a side road; instead of concrete, there was a section blocked off by wooden planks.
よく見るとそこは扉になっているようで、申し訳程度に小さな取っ手が付いていた。: Looking closely, it seemed to function as a door, fitted with a pitifully small handle.
躊躇なく久遠が取っ手に手を掛ける。鍵が掛かっていると云う事もなく、すんなりと扉が: Qwon reached for the handle without hesitation. It wasn't even locked; the door swung open smoothly.
――中は雑然とした、正に倉庫と呼ぶに相応しい空間だった。: —Inside was a cluttered space that was the very definition of a warehouse.
大きな木箱がいくつも積み重ねられ、木材や鉄骨などまで転がっている。: Massive wooden crates were piled high, and scraps of lumber and steel beams lay scattered about.
奏介「……唯の資材置場だな」: Sousuke: “...It’s just a construction storage site.”
久遠「表に出せないような物を保管しているようですね。他国から密輸した武器弾薬、違: Kuon: “It seems he stores things here that cannot be brought into the open. Smuggled weapons and ammunition from other nations, illegal drugs, and various other items entirely unfitting for a privately run trading firm.”
奏介「……軍と繋がっているからそう云う物も手に入れられるのか？」: Sousuke: “...Is it because of his military ties that he can get his hands on this stuff?”
久遠「そうでしょうね。彼は国の為と言いながら、私腹を肥やす事に熱中しているようで: Kuon: “Most likely. While he claims to act for the sake of the nation, he seems preoccupied with lining his own pockets. —Though he doesn't seem to realize it himself.”
久遠「或いは――気付いていても止められないのか……」: Kuon: “Or perhaps—he realizes it, yet cannot stop...”
奏介「――連中の思惑なんざ俺には関係ねえ。俺はただ、奴らがしでかした莫迦な事を終: Sousuke: “—I don't give a damn about their motives. I just want to end the idiocy they've started.”
頷きながら久遠は倉庫の一角へ歩いていく。: Nodding, Qwon walked toward a corner of the warehouse.
俺も足元に気をつけながら彼女へ付いていった。: I followed after her, minding my footing in the gloom.
久遠「――こちらのエレベータから社長室へ上がる事が出来ます」: Kuon: “—We can take this elevator up to the President’s office.”
奏介「大丈夫なんだろうな？ 途中の階で誰かが入ってくるとか――」: Sousuke: “Are you sure it’s safe? What if someone gets on at a floor in between—?”
久遠「奏介は心配性ですね。直通ですから此処と社長室、あと一階以外には止まりません: Kuon: “You worry too much, Sousuke. It is a direct line; it does not stop anywhere except for here, the President's office, and the first floor.”
久遠「それに逢禅寺と一部の側近しか使えませんから、出会う確率は極めて低いと云えま: Kuon: “Furthermore, since only Ouzenji and a few of his inner circle use it, the probability of an encounter is extremely low. The stairs would be far more dangerous.”
慣れた手つきで久遠はエレベータの操作盤を弄る。: With practiced movements, Qwon began to manipulate the elevator’s control panel.
奏介「内通者に聞いたとは云え――詳し過ぎねえか？」: Sousuke: “Even if you heard it from an informant—you know way too much about this, don't you?”
久遠「――一時期、この建物に幽閉されていましたから。……正直、あまりいい思い出は: Kuon: “—I was confined in this building for a time. ...To be honest, I do not have many pleasant memories of the place.”
振り返った久遠の表情は少し哀しげで――俺はそれ以上訊くのを躊躇った。: When she turned back, Qwon’s expression was tinged with a faint sorrow—and I hesitated to ask anything more.
久遠の言葉の後、軽い振動と共にエレベータの扉が開いた。: Following Qwon’s words, the elevator doors slid open with a slight vibration.
久遠「ここを上がれば社長室です。――逢禅寺が留守である事を祈りましょう」: Kuon: “Once we go up, we will be in the President’s office. —Let us pray that Ouzenji is away.”
俺は無言で頷きを返し、エレベータの狭い箱に乗り込んだ。: I gave her a silent nod and stepped into the cramped box of the elevator.
エレベータから出ると、小綺麗な廊下に出た。此処が最上階なのだろう、人影は全くなか: When we stepped out, we found ourselves in a tidy hallway. This must be the top floor; there wasn't a soul in sight.
久遠の先導で廊下を進む。分厚い絨毯に靴が沈み込む。: I followed Qwon down the hall. My shoes sank into the thick, plush carpet.
行く手に大きな扉がある。: A large set of doors stood ahead of us.
扉に掘られた紋章のような物を見て感想を洩らす。: I muttered my impression as I looked at what appeared to be an emblem carved into the doors.
久遠「――誰も居ないようです」: Kuon: “—It seems no one is here.”
その扉に耳を押しつけて中の様子を窺っていた久遠は、そう言うとゆっくりと扉を開けた: Qwon pressed her ear against the door to listen, then slowly pushed it open.
きしみ音もたてず、静かに扉が開いていく。: The doors opened silently, without a single creak.
そこは――社長室と云うよりも、何か会議室のようなだだっ広さの部屋だった。: The room was—less like a President’s office and more like a cavernous conference hall.
大きな机がひとつ、左右の壁に本棚が並んでいる。: There was a single massive desk, and bookshelves lined the walls to the left and right.
そして、正面は一面の硝子張りで、闇に沈んでいる街が一望できた。: And straight ahead, one wall was entirely made of glass, offering a panoramic view of the city swallowed by the night.
地下を異動していた為に全く気付かなかったが、既に夜は更けていた。: Since we had been moving underground, I hadn't noticed at all, but the night was already deep.
室内を呆けたように見回していた俺に久遠が声を掛けてくる。: Qwon called out to me as I stood there, dazed, staring around the room.
久遠「《リフ＝ラフ》の本体か、製作資料を探してください」: Kuon: “Please look for the Rif-Raf unit itself, or the production records.”
既に久遠は本棚の方へ向かっている。: Qwon had already begun heading toward the bookshelves.
久遠「製作資料はファイルケース――書類綴じに纏められている筈です。《リフ＝ラフ》: Kuon: “The records should be gathered in a file case—a document binder. As for the Rif-Raf—I think you will know it when you see it.”
奏介「見れば判る、ったってな――」: Sousuke: “Knowing it when I see it doesn't help much—”
久遠「妙な物が見つかればそれです。具体的には――妙な形の拳銃と云えば判りやすいで: Kuon: “If you find something strange, that is it. Specifically—perhaps it is easiest to describe it as a peculiarly shaped handgun.”
拳銃のような形をしているのなら、本棚の中に仕舞う事は出来ないだろう。: If it was shaped like a handgun, it probably wouldn't be tucked away on a bookshelf.
壇の上にある机へ歩み寄る。: I walked over to the desk sitting on the dais.
部屋の広さと比較したら小さめに見えた机だが、近づいてみると畳数枚分はありそうな大: Compared to the vastness of the room, the desk looked small, but as I got closer, I realized it was massive—large enough to fit several tatami mats.
こんな広くても、どうせ自分の前の一角しか使わないだろうに。: Even with all this space, I bet he only ever uses the small section right in front of him.
しゃがみ込み、机の下を調べる。: I crouched down and began to search under the desk.
引き出しがいくつかある。開けてみると万年筆や印鑑に混じって無骨な拳銃が仕舞われて: There were several drawers. When I opened them, I found a rugged handgun tucked away among fountain pens and name seals.
久遠に拳銃を見せる。: I showed the handgun to Qwon.
久遠「――それは普通の九四年式拳銃です。一昨年に採用された新式の拳銃ですね」: Kuon: “—That is a standard Type 94 handgun. It is a new model adopted just the year before last.”
奏介「……道理で見た事もない訳だ」: Sousuke: “...No wonder I've never seen one before.”
まあ――拳銃などそうそう見る機会などないのだが。: Well—it’s not like I get many chances to see handguns anyway.

決して負けていない。むしろ激昂しかけている逢禅寺の方が追いつめられているのか。: She wasn't backing down at all. If anything, it was Ouzenji who seemed backed into a corner, on the verge of losing his temper.

すぐに俺にも解った。何処からか煙が洩れてきている。: I noticed it immediately as well. Smoke was drifting in from somewhere.
壁際に並んでいた本棚が倒れ、奥から洩れてきているようだ。: The bookshelves against the wall had fallen, and it was leaking from behind them.
その煙の中からマスターが転がり出てきた。: The Master tumbled out from within the smoke.
久遠「――護堂、奏介を頼みます」: Kuon: “—Godou, please take care of Sousuke.”
慣れた様子で久遠が指示を出す。: Qwon gave the instruction with practiced ease.
奏介「マスター……あんた、何者だ……？」: Sousuke: “Master... who the hell are you...?”
護堂「――喋るな、傷に障る」: Godou: “—Don't talk. It'll aggravate the wound.”
マスターは軽々と俺を背負い上げた。: The Master effortlessly hoisted me onto his back.
護堂「……邪魔が入って取り逃がした。逃げる際書類に火を付けられた――」: Godou: “...Interference allowed her to escape. She set fire to the documents before she fled—”
護堂「――地下を通って脱出する」: Godou: “—We shall escape through the basement.”
久遠は垂れ下がる俺の手を掴んで頷いた。: Qwon squeezed my drooping hand and gave a firm nod.
脇腹に激しい痛み。: A sharp pain tore through my side.
その拍子に、頭の中に蟠っていた違和感が消えた。: At that moment, the sense of wrongness that had been festering in my mind vanished.
そして、自分が久遠の首を絞めていた事に気付く。: And I realized that I had been strangling Qwon.
その声は――マスターのものだった。: That voice—it belonged to the Master.
見たこともない服装で、咳き込む久遠の側で膝を付く。: Dressed in clothes I had never seen before, he knelt beside the coughing Qwon.
葵の舌打ちと共に、頭の中を覆っていた不快感が消えていく。: Along with Aoi’s clicking tongue, the unpleasant sensation clouding my mind faded away.
《リフ＝ラフ》の効果が消えたのか――？: Had the effect of the Rif-Raf worn off—?
葵が叫びながら、本物の拳銃を抜いた。: Aoi screamed as she drew a real handgun.
葵が放った銃弾が、次々と護堂の身体に吸い込まれていく。: The bullets Aoi fired were sucked into Godou’s body one after another.
庇われた久遠の悲鳴に近い絶叫。: A scream tore from Qwon’s throat as he shielded her.
血塗れの護堂が久遠の肩に手を掛ける。: A bloodied Godou placed a hand on Qwon’s shoulder.
護堂「済まない……久遠、もう……護ってやれそうに……ない」: Godou: “I’m sorry... Qwon, it seems... I can no longer... protect you.”
頭を撃ち抜かれた護堂が、ゆっくりと斃れる。: Godou, shot through the head, slowly collapsed.
葵「――フン、小娘などにかまけているから――」: Aoi: “—Hmph, that’s what happens when you’re preoccupied with some brat—”
さも小莫迦にした葵の言い種に、久遠が貌を上げる。: At Aoi’s mocking words, Qwon looked up.
その表情は既にいつもの久遠に戻っていた。: Her expression had already returned to its usual state.
久遠「――貴女には解らないでしょうね。彼の想いと云うものが」: Kuon: “—I suppose you wouldn't understand. His feelings, that is.”
葵は吐き捨てるように言うと、久遠の額に銃口を押しつける。: Aoi spat out the words, pressing the muzzle of the gun against Qwon’s forehead.
葵「――あんたもすぐに後を追わせてあげる」: Aoi: “—I’ll let you follow right after him.”
逢禅寺「御巫にはまだ利用価値がある。殺すな」: Houzenji: “Mikanagi still has value. Do not kill her.”
葵「しかし――この娘は危険です。今処分してしまわないと――」: Aoi: “But—this girl is dangerous. If we do not dispose of her now—”
逢禅寺「所詮小娘、取り巻きがおらねば何も出来まい」: Houzenji: “She is just a girl; she can do nothing without her followers.”
逢禅寺は葵から取り上げた拳銃を俺に向けてきた。: Ouzenji took the handgun from Aoi and pointed it at me.
逢禅寺「見所があると感じたのだが――残念だよ」: Houzenji: “I felt you had promise—it’s a shame.”
久遠「貴方たちに協力します。ですから彼は――」: Kuon: “I will cooperate with you. So he—”
葵「今更命乞いかい？ 調子のいい事言ってるんじゃないわよ？」: Aoi: “Begging for your life now? Don't give me that bullshit.”
久遠の頬を張った葵を止める逢禅寺。: Ouzenji stopped Aoi as she slapped Qwon’s cheek.
逢禅寺「御巫よ、我々に絶対服従すると誓うのならば、この若者の命を助けてやらなくも: Houzenji: “Mikanagi, if you swear absolute obedience to us, I might just spare this young man’s life.”
それは、俺が初めて見た、彼女の逡巡の表情だった。: It was the first time I had ever seen her look so hesitant.
逢禅寺「貴様は賢しいからな、首輪を付けておかねばならん。誓えないのなら――」: Houzenji: “You are a clever one; I must keep you on a leash. If you cannot swear—”
逢禅寺が拳銃の撃鉄を起こす。: Ouzenji cocked the hammer of the handgun.
久遠「……今はこうするしかありません」: Kuon: “...This is the only way for now.”
苦渋の決断だったのだろう、久遠はずっと唇を噛み続けている。: It must have been a bitter decision; Qwon continued to bite her lip.
勝ち誇ったような逢禅寺の高笑い。: Ouzenji’s triumphant laughter filled the air.
俺はそれが、無性に悔しかった。: I felt a surge of pure, unadulterated frustration.
とは云え、今の俺にはどうする事も出来なかった。: Yet, in my current state, there was nothing I could do.
逢禅寺「――近々新宿の陸軍軍医学校に、防疫研究室が設立される。貴様は生物学にも長: Houzenji: “—An Epidemic Prevention Research Laboratory is to be established soon at the Army Medical School in Shinjuku. You should be well-versed in biology as well.”
逢禅寺「御巫よ、貴様は其処で御国の為となる研究に従事するのだ」: Houzenji: “Mikanagi, you shall engage in research there for the sake of the nation.”
――俺は、その場で逢禅寺の部下らしき連中に拘束された。: —And I was seized on the spot by men who seemed to be Ouzenji’s subordinates.
逢禅寺「貴様等――何をしておる」: Houzenji: “What are you people doing here?”
部屋に入ってきたのは、以前《清鳳会》の事務所で見た大男だった。: The man who entered the room was the massive man I had seen before at the Seihoukai office.
逢禅寺「――何故貴様等が此処に居るのかと訊いている」: Houzenji: “—I am asking why you are here.”
久遠「――自らの犯した過ちを清算する為です」: Kuon: “—To settle the mistakes I have made.”
逢禅寺「応じると思うかね？」: Houzenji: “Do you really think I would comply?”
そう言うと逢禅寺は懐から素早く拳銃を抜き取った。: With those words, Ouzenji quickly drew a handgun from his coat.
いや――拳銃ではない。もっと奇妙な形をしている。: No—it wasn't a handgun. It had a much stranger shape.
逢禅寺「無意味だと？ この《リフ＝ラフ》の力は貴様が一番良く解っているであろう」: Houzenji: “Meaningless? You should understand the power of the Rif-Raf better than anyone.”
久遠「ええ――それの事は私が一番理解しています。勿論――欠陥も」: Kuon: “Yes—I understand it better than anyone. Including—its defects.”
逢禅寺「……儂を謀ろうと云うつもりか？」: Houzenji: “...Are you planning to deceive me?”
久遠「――まさか。私は警告を与えているに過ぎません」: Kuon: “—Hardly. I am merely giving you a warning.”
微笑を浮かべる久遠。: A smile played on Qwon’s lips.
久遠「《リフ＝ラフ》に内蔵されている集積回路は、数回使用すると灼けてしまい、意図: Kuon: “The integrated circuits within the Rif-Raf are prone to burning out after a few uses, which can lead to unintended behavior.”
久遠「私が居なくなってからも何度か使っているようですが――そろそろ基板の寿命が来: Kuon: “You seem to have used it several times since I left—I imagine the circuit board is nearing the end of its life.”
久遠「どのような誤動作を起こすのかは私にも解りません。最悪、指向性がある筈の音声: Kuon: “I cannot say for certain what kind of malfunction it might cause. At worst, the audio that should be directional might scatter in every direction.”
逢禅寺が《リフ＝ラフ》を床に叩きつけた。: Ouzenji slammed the Rif-Raf onto the floor.
護堂「――不意打ちとは感心しませんな」: Godou: “—A sneak attack is hardly admirable.”
横から延びてきた刃が、久遠に向けて振り下ろされた逢禅寺の刀を防ぐ。: A blade swung in from the side, parrying Ouzenji’s sword as it was brought down toward Qwon.
久遠の眼前でふたりが鍔迫り合う。: The two of them locked blades right in front of Qwon.
久遠「――私が言った事は全て嘘ですけれど」: Kuon: “—Though everything I just said was a lie.”
激昂する逢禅寺を余所に、久遠はその身を数歩後退させる。: Ignoring the furious Ouzenji, Qwon stepped back several paces.
凄まじい逢禅寺の斬撃が護堂を襲う。: Ouzenji’s ferocious strikes rained down on Godou.
しかし、護堂もそれを悉く受け流している。: However, Godou parried every single one of them.
俺なんかが立ち入れない、人知を越えた闘いだ。: It was a battle beyond human knowledge, a place where someone like me could never interfere.
何合かの剣戟の後、逢禅寺の持つ刀が宙を飛んだ。: After several exchanges of steel, the sword Ouzenji was holding flew through the air.
床を滑り、俺の足許にまで転がって来た。: It slid across the floor and came to a stop at my feet.
反射的に刀を掴み、逢禅寺に対して構える。: Reflexively, I grabbed the sword and leveled it at Ouzenji.
俺の動きが見えていたのだろう、護堂が低い声で制する。: Godou must have seen my movement; his low voice held me back.
好機と見たのか、逢禅寺が無手のまま護堂へ掴み掛かっていく。: Seeing an opening, Ouzenji lunged at Godou bare-handed.
護堂「――苦い思いをするのは、俺ひとりで充分だ」: Godou: “—It is enough that I am the only one who has to taste this bitterness.”
呟く護堂の傍らで、袈裟懸けに斬られた逢禅寺の身体がゆっくりと斃れていった。: As Godou whispered, Ouzenji’s body, slashed diagonally across the chest, slowly collapsed to the floor.
――転がり込んだ部屋は、最初展望室か何かだと思った。: The room I tumbled into... at first, I thought it was some kind of observation deck.
壁の一面が硝子張りになっており、東京の夜景が見渡せる。: One whole wall was made of glass, offering a sweeping view of the Tokyo night-scape.
いつか聞き覚えのある声に、俺は貌を上げた。: At the sound of that familiar voice, I jerked my head up.
隻眼の大男が、正面で仁王立ちをしていた。: A massive, one-eyed man stood there, feet planted firmly in a dominant, overbearing stance.
奏介「――あんたは《清鳳会》のボスだったはずだ」: Sousuke: “...You’re supposed to be the boss of the Seifou-kai.”
綾音を庇うように前に立ち、大男を睨み据える。: I stepped in front of Ayane to shield her, glaring straight at the giant.
男は口許を歪める。: The man’s mouth twisted into a distorted smirk.
逢禅寺「例えそうであろうとも――この場で、不法侵入者の君たちに言う義理などないと: Houzenji: “Even if I were... I don’t believe I owe any explanations to a pair of common trespassers like yourselves.”
何とか《リフ＝ラフ》とやらの証拠などをつかもうと思ったのだが、見つかってしまえば: I’d hoped to find some shred of evidence regarding that "Riff-Raff" thing, but now that we’ve been caught, we don’t have a leg to stand on.
逢禅寺「……侵入者の小娘如きに名乗るつもりはない」: Houzenji: “...I have no intention of introducing myself to a little trespassing slip of a girl.”
綾音「――貴方がその程度の小物とも思えませんが」: Ayane: “...I find it hard to believe a man of your stature is such a small-time player.”
逢禅寺「――小娘の分際で儂を挑発するか」: Houzenji: “...A mere girl, and yet you dare provoke me?”
杖で床を叩く。: He struck the floor with his cane.
綾音の手が俺の腕を掴んできた。: Ayane’s hand reached out and gripped my arm.
綾音「《逢禅寺商会》の会長――逢禅寺清正氏でよろしいですか？」: Ayane: “The Chairman of Ouzenji Trading... Mr. Kiyomasa Ouzenji, I presume?”
逢禅寺「――ハッ、知っているのならばわざわざ訊ねる事もあるまいて」: Houzenji: “...Hah. If you already know, there was no need to ask.”
綾音「貴方から名乗って欲しかったのですが――いいでしょう」: Ayane: “I wanted to hear it from your own lips—but very well.”
気丈に綾音は姿勢を正す。: Ayane straightened her posture with forced courage.
俺の腕を掴む手から震えは抜けない。: But the trembling in the hand clutching my arm didn't stop.
これ以上、綾音に辛い思いをさせてはいけない。: I can't let Ayane suffer through this any longer.
奏介「――あんたに訊きたい事がある」: Sousuke: “...There are things I want to ask you.”
綾音を後ろ手に庇い、俺はボス――逢禅寺と対峙する。: Shielding Ayane behind my back, I confronted the boss—Ouzenji.
逢禅寺は余裕を崩す事なく、泰然と構えている。: Ouzenji remained utterly composed, radiating an air of calm authority.
奏介「《リフ＝ラフ》の在処、そして《連続狂人殺傷事件》に関するあんたの企み――そ: Sousuke: “The location of the Riff-Raff, and your schemes regarding the Serial Madman Slayings... along with everything else.”
逢禅寺「――訊かれて素直に答えると思っているのかね？」: Houzenji: “...And do you truly believe I would answer you truthfully just because you asked?”
逢禅寺「いや――教えてやるとも。《リフ＝ラフ》は――ここにある」: Houzenji: “No—actually, I’ll tell you. The Riff-Raff is... right here.”
逢禅寺が袂から奇妙な形の銃を取りだした。: Ouzenji pulled a strangely shaped gun from the folds of his garment.
――俺を狂わせ、日の当たらない世界へ追いやった悪魔の機械。: ...The demonic machine that drove me mad and cast me into a world of shadows.
逢禅寺「《連続狂人殺傷事件》などは、単なる実験に過ぎん。この偉大なる帝国の、更な: Houzenji: “The Serial Madman Slayings were nothing more than a simple experiment. Noble sacrifices to serve as the foundation for the further development of this Great Empire—”
奏介「巫山戯るなッ！！ それで――どれだけの人間が巻き込まれたと思ってる！！」: Sousuke: “Don’t give me that bullshit!! Do you have any idea—how many people were dragged into this?!”
逢禅寺「欧米との戦争になれば、更に多くの犠牲が出るだろう。被害を最小に食い止める: Houzenji: “If war breaks out with the West, the casualties will be far greater. To minimize the damage, the people must stand united against foreign enemies.”
逢禅寺「謂わば体制を一元化する為の素晴らしき――神が創りたもうた装置なのだよ、《: Houzenji: “It is a magnificent device meant to unify the system—a machine created by God Himself. That is what the Riff-Raff is.”
久遠「――私は神などと云う曖昧な存在ではありません」: Kuon: “...I am not some ambiguous existence like a god.”
――背中から声がした。: A voice rang out from behind us.
久遠「――遅れました、奏介」: Kuon: “...I apologize for the delay, Sousuke.”
久遠「伝言は通じたようですね。この男こそ――全ての元兇です」: Kuon: “It seems my message got through. This man—he is the source of everything.”
逢禅寺「貴様に言われたくはないな御巫久遠。我が組織を簒奪し、私利に使った罪――赦: Houzenji: “I don’t want to hear that from you, Qwon Mikanagi. The crime of usurping my organization for your own selfish gain... it cannot be forgiven.”
久遠「私欲に走ったのは貴方です逢禅寺清正。国の為と大義名分を掲げながら、軍を私的: Kuon: “You are the one who succumbed to greed, Kiyomasa Ouzenji. While hiding behind the banner of national interest, you used the military for your own private ends and built a fortune by socially eliminating anyone who opposed you.”
逢禅寺「国を良くする為には資金が必要なのだ！！ 貴様のような小娘には解るまい！！: Houzenji: “Funds are necessary to better the nation!! A little girl like you could never understand!!”
久遠「貴方のなさっている事はいずれ国を滅ぼします。開戦のための富国策など――」: Kuon: “What you are doing will eventually destroy this country. A wealth-building policy for the sake of starting a war is—”
久遠「でも――もしかしたら五十年も経てば間違っていなかったと評価されるかもしれま: Kuon: “But... perhaps fifty years from now, people might judge that you weren't entirely wrong. That is—provided the post-war reconstruction goes smoothly.”
逢禅寺が《リフ＝ラフ》を久遠に向ける。: Ouzenji aimed the Riff-Raff at Qwon.
久遠「――私は何者にも属しません。国家にも――無論個人にも。私は御巫久遠、それ以: Kuon: “...I belong to no one. Not to the state—and certainly not to any individual. I am Qwon Mikanagi, and nothing more.”
久遠「私に――そのような《リフ＝ラフ》は効きません」: Kuon: “A device like that... the Riff-Raff... has no effect on me.”
久遠はそれを拾い――手に掲げる。: Qwon picked it up—and held it aloft.
久遠「――《リフ＝ラフ》とは、《繰り返し苛立ちを与えるもの》です。ですが同時に《: Kuon: “...The Riff-Raff is ‘that which brings repeated irritation.’ But at the same time, it also means something ‘trivial’ or ‘worthless.’”
久遠「本当に――つまらないものを作ってしまいました」: Kuon: “You really have... created something utterly worthless.”
まるで縺れた糸を一瞬で解きほぐすように――: As if unraveling a tangled thread in a single instant—
久遠が持っていた《リフ＝ラフ》はばらばらに、原型を留めぬ程に砕け散ってしまった。: The Riff-Raff in Qwon’s hand shattered into pieces, crushed beyond recognition.
久遠「人を操る事など――機械に頼らずとも簡単な事ですから」: Kuon: “Controlling people... is easy enough to do without relying on machines.”
綾音「いくら国を思ってした事とはいえ、貴方の罪は大き過ぎます。でも――やり直す事: Ayane: “No matter how much you thought you were doing it for the country, your crimes are far too great. But... you should be able to start over.”
逢禅寺「ククッ――小娘に諭されるとはな……フッ！！」: Houzenji: “Heh... to be lectured by a slip of a girl... Hah!!”
咄嗟に――俺は綾音の身体を抱いて横へ跳んだ。: Instinctively—I threw my arms around Ayane and leaped to the side.
床に落ちた衝撃で綾音が声を挙げる。: Ayane let out a cry as we hit the floor.
逢禅寺「生き恥を晒す事なぞ日本男児に出来ようかッ！ 見るがいい！ 我が最期をッ！: Houzenji: “Could a son of Japan ever endure the shame of living?! Behold! Witness my end!!”
諸肌を脱いだ逢禅寺が刃先を自らの腹へ突き立てる。: Ouzenji, having bared his chest, plunged the blade into his own stomach.
綾音の視線を俺は掌で覆い隠した。: I covered Ayane’s eyes with my palm.
だが俺自身は、逢禅寺の最期を見届けていた。: But I myself watched Ouzenji’s final moments.
奴ほどの膂力なら、ここに居た者全てを切り伏せる事も容易かった筈だ。: With his strength, he could have easily cut down everyone in this room.
だが彼は、敢えてそうせず、自らの命を絶った。: And yet, he chose not to, and took his own life instead.
それとも、彼もまた誰かに操られていただけの人間だったのだろうか――: Or was he, too, just another human being being manipulated by someone else?
綾音が俺の手をそっと掴み、立ち上がる。: Ayane gently took my hand and stood up.
少し赤く充血した目をぱちぱちと瞬き、綾音は漸く笑顔になった。: Blinking her slightly bloodshot eyes, Ayane finally managed a smile.
綾音「帰ろっ、奏介。日常へ――」: Ayane: “Let’s go home, Sousuke. Back to our everyday lives...”
ビルから脱出した俺と美華夏は、燃え落ちてくる建物の破片を避けつつ、野次馬に混じっ: Having escaped the building, Mikage and I avoided the falling debris as we watched the fire from a distance, mingling with the crowd of onlookers.
久遠と護堂が出てくるのをずっと待ち続けていた。: We kept waiting for Qwon and Godou to come out.
鎮火され、野次馬が散り始めても、ふたりの姿は見つからなかった。: Even as the fire was extinguished and the crowd began to disperse, there was no sign of the two of them.
美華夏が俺の腕を引き、漸く俺はその場を離れた。警官や憲兵が彷徨いていて危険だった: Mikage pulled on my arm, and I finally left the scene. It was dangerous with the police and military police prowling about.
――あの夜から数日が経った。: ...Several days have passed since that night.
俺はひとりバーのカウンタに腰掛け、ちびりちびりとウィスキーを啜っていた。: I sat alone at the bar counter, sipping whiskey bit by bit.
バーには誰も居ない。マスターが居ないのは当然として、千花と璃宝も何処かへ出掛けて: There’s no one else in the bar. It’s a given that the Master isn't here, but Chika and Riho have also gone out somewhere.
何やらマスターが居ないままでも店を続けられるよう方々へ話を付けに行っているらしい: Apparently, they’ve gone to talk to various people to ensure the shop can stay open even without the Master.
俺には関係ない――と強ち言ってもいられないのだが。: I can’t exactly say it doesn’t concern me, though.
どうも璃宝と千花は俺をバーテンダーに仕立て上げたいらしい。: It seems Riho and Chika want to turn me into a bartender.
